1.  Introduction

    1.  Purpose

The purpose of this Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document is to define the functional, non-functional, and interface requirements of the Undergraduate Transfer Management System to be developed for İzmir Institute of Technology (İYTE).

This document aims to:

-   Provide a precise description of the system’s goals, boundaries, and stakeholders.

-   Specify all system functionalities based on the TO-BE process model.

-   Serve as a contractual agreement between the development team and project stakeholders.

-   Guide future design, implementation, testing, and evaluation activities.

    1.  Scope 

The Undergraduate Transfer Management System is a web-based platform integrated with UBYS that automates and manages the inter-institutional undergraduate transfer process. The system simplifies and digitizes tasks performed by:

-   Student

-   Student Affairs Office (ÖİDB)

-   Foreign Languages Department (YDYO)

-   Dean’s Office

-   Faculty Board

-   Departmental Transfer Commission (YGK)

-   YÖKSİS / e-Devlet

-   UBYS (University Information System)

-   NVI (General Directorate of Population and Citizenship Affairs)

The system provides:

-   Digital application submission

-   Automated identity and academic data retrieval through APIs (YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI, e-Devlet)

-   Automated document management and version control

-   Role-based access for each stakeholder

-   Automated pre-screening and eligibility checks

-   Automatic transfer score calculation and ranking

-   Digital course equivalence (intibak) preparation

-   Workflow-based decision approval

-   Automated result publication and notification

-   End-to-end audit trail and traceability

Overview

This SRS document is structured into three main sections:

Section 1 – Introduction:
Provides the purpose, scope, terminology, references, and overview of the system.
Section 2 – Overall Description:
Summarizes the product perspective, product functions, user characteristics, system constraints, assumptions, dependencies and requirements.
Section 3 – Specific Requirements:
Includes detailed use cases, user interfaces, system interactions, performance requirements, database requirements, and design constraints.

The SRS serves as a foundation for the design and implementation of the Undergraduate Transfer Management System and will guide all future development and testing activities to ensure that the final system satisfies the needs of all stakeholders involved in the transfer process.

2.  Overall description

    1.  Product Perspective

This document defines the requirements for the Undergraduate Transfer Management System, which will be developed to manage and automate the undergraduate transfer processes at Izmir Institute of Technology.

This system is designed to address the inefficiencies experienced in the current process, which relies heavily on manual operations. It will replace the shortcomings of the current system, such as manual data verification, inefficient document management, and manual score calculations.

The core product perspective of the Undergraduate Transfer Management System is its full integration with IYTE's existing UBYS. Furthermore, it will establish direct API integration with national data sources such as YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, and e-Devlet to automate and digitize the entire process, from application intake and equivalence preparations to the announcement of results.

The main objectives of the system are:

-   Accuracy: To eliminate manual data entry errors through automatic data retrieval from YÖKSİS and ÖSYM.

-   Speed: To reduce the administrative workload by automating scoring, ranking, and pre-screening processes.

-   Transparency: To provide real-time status tracking for all stakeholders and automated notifications for students.

    1.  Product Perspective Context Diagram

According to the context diagram specified in the Problem Analysis Report, the external entities that interact with the system are listed below:

[]

Product Functions

The Undergraduate Transfer Management System (according to the TO-BE model) will offer the following core functions:

-   Automated Data Integration and Validation

    -   Automatically fetches and validates candidate identity, GPA, and YKS score data from YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI, and e-Devlet APIs.

-   Automated Pre-Screening

    -   Automatically filters and rejects applications based on mandatory criteria defined in the regulations, such as minimum GPA (2.50/4.00), correct application semester (3rd and 5th), and application deadlines.

-   Role-Based Access Control 

    -   Allows different stakeholders (ÖİDB, YDYO, Dean's Office, YGK) to simultaneously access the system and view only the documents and perform actions relevant to their responsibilities.

-   Automated Document Management

    -   Automatically renames documents uploaded by candidates to a standard format (e.g., "Transcript_StudentName.pdf").

    -   Allows all documents belonging to a single applicant to be downloaded as one structured folder by the relevant unit.

    -   Provides version control if documents are re-uploaded.

-   Automated Scoring and Ranking

    -   Automatically calculates the transfer scores of candidates according to the official formula defined in the regulation.

    -   Automatically generates ranked primary (asil) and waitlist (yedek) lists for each program based on the calculated scores.

-   Digital İntibak (Course Equivalence) Module

    -   Enables YGK to prepare course equivalences (intibak) using a digital interface instead of manual forms.

    -   The system suggests possible equivalences to the committee based on course code, name, and ECTS similarity.

-   Transparent Tracking and Automated Notifications

    -   Provides a dashboard for all stakeholders (ÖİDB, YGK, etc.) to track the real-time status of applications (e.g., "In Pre-Screening," "Under YGK Evaluation," "Approved").

    -   Sends automated email and portal notifications to students upon successful submission and when final results are published.

    1.  User Characteristics

The system is designed to serve various stakeholder groups involved in the transfer process (as defined in the Problem Analysis Report, Sections 1.1 and 3.1):

-   Student

    -   The primary actor of the system.

    -   Initiates the transfer application via the UBYS portal, uploads required documents (transcript, YKS result, etc.), and tracks their application status.

-   Student Affairs (ÖİDB)

    -   Performs the initial administrative verification of applications (completeness, validity).

    -   Routes applications to the relevant faculties.

    -   Consolidates final decisions, publishes the primary/waitlist lists via the system, and coordinates the process.

-   Foreign Languages Department (YDYO)

    -   The unit responsible for verifying the English language proficiency documents (exam results, etc.) uploaded by applicants to the system.

-   Dean's Office

    -   Forwards applications to departmental transfer commissions (YGK).

    -   Oversees the consolidation of departmental results.

    -   Submits finalized decisions to the Faculty Board for formal approval.

    -   Transmits approved decisions to Student Affairs.

-   Faculty Board

    -   Acts as the official approval body within the Dean's Office.

    -   Reviews, validates, and ratifies results submitted by the YGK.

    -   Ensures regulatory compliance and institutional accuracy.

-   Departmental Transfer Commission (YGK)

    -   Acts as the department-level committee.

    -   Performs the academic evaluation of applicants.

    -   Prepares rankings for applicants.

    -   Prepares course equivalence reports.

    -   Submits rankings and reports to the Faculty Board for approval.

-   UBYS 

    -   The core IT system that hosts the entire transfer process, records data, and manages the workflow.

-   YÖKSİS/e-Devlet

    -   External national systems that provide data to the system for verifying identity and academic information (GPA, YKS Score).

    1.  Constraints

-   System Integration Mandate: Full and uninterrupted integration with UBYS , YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, and e-Devlet APIs  is mandatory. Any downtime in these external systems will directly impact the system's functionality.

-   Legal and Regulation Compliance: The system must strictly adhere to all rules specified in the İYTE Inter-Institutional Transfer Regulation (e.g., 2.50 minimum GPA, valid application semesters, scoring formula).

-   Role-Based Access Control : The system must strictly restrict access to sensitive student data (transcripts, etc.) for different stakeholders (ÖİDB, YDYO, YGK). Each user must only be able to access data relevant to their role.

-   Data Security: Personal and sensitive data, such as student transcripts, exam results, and identity information, must be encrypted with high security standards during storage and transmission.

-   Automated Calculation Reliability: The transfer scores and rankings automatically calculated by the system must be 100% accurate, as these calculations directly determine student admissions.

    1.  Assumptions and Dependencies

-   External Data Accuracy (Assumption): It is assumed that the data received from YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, and e-Devlet APIs (identity, GPA, exam score) is accurate, complete, and up-to-date. Errors in this data could lead to incorrect pre-screening by the system.

-   UBYS Integration (Dependency): The system's core functionality is dependent on the core UBYS system being operational and supporting the API integration.

-   User Adoption (Assumption): It is assumed that ÖİDB, YDYO, and especially YGK committee members will be trained on and will adopt the system, using the digital intibak module and other digital approval mechanisms instead of manual forms.

-   Technical Infrastructure (Assumption): It is assumed that all institutional stakeholders and applicant students have the necessary hardware, modern web browsers, and stable internet connections to access the system.

-   Regulation Consistency (Assumption): It is assumed that the university regulations defining application and evaluation criteria (e.g., scoring formulas) will remain largely stable during the system's development and implementation phase.

    1.  Apportioning of Requirements

To ensure the core functionality of the Transfer Management System, requirements are prioritized as follows:

High Priority Requirements:

-   Allow students to create applications and upload mandatory documents (transcript, YKS result, etc.) via the UBYS portal.

-   Automatically fetch and validate core academic data (GPA, YKS score) from YÖKSİS and ÖSYM APIs.

-   Automatically pre-screen applications based on regulation criteria (minimum GPA, valid semester)^(.)

-   Automatically calculate transfer scores based on the official formula ((x/y × 100 × 0.9) + (z × 0.1)) and generate primary/waitlist lists.

-   Implement strict Role-Based Access Control for stakeholders (ÖİDB, YDYO, YGK).

-   Allow YDYO personnel to process the English proficiency status (Pass/Fail/Exempt) through the system.

-   Publish final results on the UBYS portal and send automated email/portal notifications to students.

Medium Priority Requirements:

-   A Digital Intibak Module for YGK: To prepare and approve course equivalences through the system instead of manual forms.

-   Automated document management: Automatic renaming of uploaded files and bulk download of all documents for a single applicant.

-   Digital Decision Transmission: YGK and the Dean's Office must digitally transmit final decisions (including intibak) to ÖİDB via the system.

Low Priority Requirements:

-   Version control for documents (storing the old version if a document is re-uploaded).

-   An online appeals mechanism for students after the results are announced.

 Advanced administrative reporting and analytics tools regarding the process
3.0 Common System Exceptions and Error Handling
The following exception flows are generic and apply to almost all use cases in the system. Instead of repeating them in every individual use case description, they are defined here globally. All use cases inherit these exception behaviors unless otherwise specified.

+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| Exception ID | Exception Name                 | Description & System Behavior                                                                                                                                   | Standard Error Code       |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| EX.Global.1  | Database Connection Failure    | Trigger: The system fails to connect to the internal database (UBYS DB) during a read/write operation.                                                          | [X]01-DB (e.g., 101-DB)   |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | Behavior:                                                                                                                                                       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 1. The system logs the connection error with a high-priority timestamp.                                                                                         |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 2. The user is displayed a generic error message: "Sistemsel bir hata oluştu. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin."                                                |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 3. The current transaction is rolled back.                                                                                                                      |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 4. The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                     |                           |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| EX.Global.2  | External API Timeout / Failure | Trigger: An external API (YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI) fails to respond within the defined timeout period (e.g., 5 seconds) or returns a 500/503 error.                   | [X]02-API (e.g., 802-API) |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | Behavior:                                                                                                                                                       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 1. The system retries the request once (if safe).                                                                                                               |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 2. If it fails again, the system logs the API error.                                                                                                            |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 3. The user is displayed a specific warning: "Dış servis (ÖSYM/YÖKSİS) şu anda yanıt vermiyor. İşleminize manuel devam ediniz veya daha sonra deneyiniz."       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 4. The system degrades gracefully (e.g., enables manual entry fields).                                                                                          |                           |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| EX.Global.3  | Session Timeout                | Trigger: The user attempts to perform an action after their session token has expired (e.g., after 30 mins of inactivity).                                      | AUTH-001                  |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | Behavior:                                                                                                                                                       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 1. The system redirects the user to the Login Screen.                                                                                                           |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 2. A message is displayed: "Oturumunuzun süresi doldu. Lütfen tekrar giriş yapınız."                                                                            |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 3. Unsaved data in the current form is lost (unless local storage caching is implemented).                                                                      |                           |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| EX.Global.4  | Unauthorized Access (403)      | Trigger: A user attempts to access a URL or resource ID (e.g., another student's application) for which they do not have permission.                            | AUTH-403                  |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | Behavior:                                                                                                                                                       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 1. The system logs a security alert with the User ID and IP.                                                                                                    |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 2. The user is redirected to their main dashboard.                                                                                                              |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 3. An error message is displayed: "Bu işlemi yapmaya yetkiniz yok."                                                                                             |                           |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| EX.Global.5  | File Upload Failure            | Trigger: A file upload is interrupted due to network issues or storage server unavailability.                                                                   | 301-STO                   |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | Behavior:                                                                                                                                                       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 1. The system stops the upload progress.                                                                                                                        |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 2. The user is displayed an error: "Dosya yüklenemedi. İnternet bağlantınızı kontrol edip tekrar deneyiniz."                                                    |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 3. The user remains on the same screen to retry.                                                                                                                |                           |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+
| EX.Global.6  | Data Validation Error          | Trigger: Malicious or malformed data (e.g., SQL injection attempt, negative quota numbers) bypasses client-side checks and is caught by server-side validation. | VAL-001                   |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | Behavior:                                                                                                                                                       |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 1. The operation is blocked.                                                                                                                                    |                           |
|              |                                |                                                                                                                                                                 |                           |
|              |                                | 2. The user is displayed a generic error: "Girdiğiniz verilerde hata var. Lütfen kontrol ediniz."                                                               |                           |
+--------------+--------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------+

3.  Specific requirements

    1.  Use cases  3.1.0 Use cases for user 0  3.1.0.1 Use case 1 for user 0  3.1.0.1.1 Use case template  

  ---------------- ------------------------ -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-0.1                                        
  Use Case Name:   Log In (System Access)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                  Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    23.11.2025               Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------ -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System User                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables any registered user to authenticate their identity using their credentials (TCKN/Username and Password) and securely access their role-specific dashboard. |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The user has an active account in the system.                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The user is not already logged in.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The system is online and accessible via a web browser.                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A secure session (token) is established.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The user is identified and their specific role (e.g., Student or Officer) is determined.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The user is redirected to the specific dashboard corresponding to their role.                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Every time a user accesses the system.                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System User accesses the application URL.                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the "Login" screen.                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The User enters their Username (TCKN) and Password.                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 4.  The User clicks the "Log In" button.                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 5.  The system validates the format of the credentials (e.g., TCKN length).                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 6.  The system authenticates the credentials against the central user database.                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 7.  The system retrieves the user's assigned role (e.g., "Student" or "YGK Member").                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 8.  The system creates a secure session token.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 9.  The system redirects the User to their role-specific landing page.                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   AC.1.STEP.6 (Invalid Credentials):                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the system determines the username/password is incorrect.                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The system displays a generic error message: "Kullanıcı adı veya şifre hatalı."                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  The system clears the password field and allows a retry.                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | -   AC.2.STEP.6 (Account Locked - Brute Force Protection):                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the system detects consecutive failed attempts exceeding the limit (e.g., 5 times).                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The system temporarily locks the account (e.g., for 15 minutes).                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  The system displays a warning message regarding the lockout.                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     4.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | -   AC.3.STEP.3 (Forgot Password):                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the User clicks the "Forgot Password" link.                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The system redirects the user to the Password Reset page (See UC-0.3).                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: All login transactions must be encrypted via SSL (HTTPS).                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: Passwords must be stored using industry-standard hashing (e.g., bcrypt) and salting.                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The system must enforce an account lockout policy to prevent brute-force attacks.                                                                        |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | Every user has been pre-registered and assigned a role by the System Admin (except Students who may self-register).                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | The exact lockout duration and attempt limit should be defined in the System Settings (UC-7.4).                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

[]3.1.0.1.2 User interface

3.1.0.1.3 Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Log In (System Access) (UC-0.1)

-   Credential validation and role retrieval must be completed without noticeable delay after the user clicks “Log In.”

-   The system must show a clear, generic error message for invalid credentials.

-   All login communication must occur over an encrypted (HTTPS) connection.

-   A secure session token must be created upon successful authentication.

-   The system must prevent automated brute-force attempts by locking the account after repeated failures.

-   If the authentication service or database is unreachable, the system must fail safely and deny access.

-   Users must always be redirected only to dashboards permitted by their assigned role.

 3.1.0.2 Use case 2 for user 0  3.1.0.2.1 Use case template  

  ---------------- ------------ -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-0.2                            
  Use Case Name:   Log Out                           
  Created By:      Group 1      Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    23.11.2025   Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------ -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System User                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables any authenticated user to securely terminate their current session, invalidating their access token and returning the system to a public state. |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The user is currently logged in (Postcondition of UC-0.1).                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The user has an active session.                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The user's session token is invalidated on the server.                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The user is redirected to the public Login screen.                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  Any unsaved data in the browser (e.g., half-filled forms) is cleared.                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per session.                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The User clicks the "Log Out" button (located in the top-right profile menu or dashboard header).                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The system displays a confirmation prompt (optional, e.g., "Are you sure you want to log out?").                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The User confirms the action.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  The system sends a logout request to the server.                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 5.  The server destroys the active session token.                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 6.  The system clears local storage/cookies related to the session.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 7.  The system redirects the browser to the Login Page (UC-0.1).                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  AC.1.STEP.4 (Automatic Timeout):                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 1.  The User remains inactive for a specified period (e.g., 30 minutes).                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The system automatically triggers the logout process (Steps 4-7).                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a message on the Login Page: "Oturumunuz zaman aşımı nedeniyle sonlandırıldı."                                                  |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.1 (Server Unreachable):                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 1.  At step 4, the system fails to reach the server to invalidate the token.                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The system deletes the local session token (client-side logout) to prevent local unauthorized access.                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The system redirects to the Login Page.                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | SR-1: The logout function must effectively clear all session data to prevent "Back button" re-entry (security requirement).                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The user wants to end their current session on this specific device.                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | Session timeout duration is configured in System Settings (UC-7.4).                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

3.1.0.2.3 Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Log Out (UC-0.2)

-   The logout action must invalidate the user’s session without delay.

-   After logout, the user must be redirected to the Login page promptly.

-   All session-related data (cookies, tokens, cached items) must be cleared to prevent re-access.

-   The system must block “Back button” access to protected pages after logout.

-   If the server cannot be reached, the client must still remove local session data to prevent unauthorized use.

-   Automatic session timeout must log the user out reliably after the configured inactivity period.

-   Only authenticated users should be able to trigger the logout operation.

-   Logout events should not leave partially active sessions or inconsistent authentication states.

3.1.0.2 Use case 3 for user 0  3.1.0.3.1 Use case template  

  ---------------- ----------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-0.3                                 
  Use Case Name:   Change Password                        
  Created By:      Group 1           Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    23.11.2025        Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System User                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables an authenticated user to change their current password to a new one for security purposes or as part of a mandatory password rotation policy. |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The user is currently logged in (Postcondition of UC-0.1).                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The user has an active session.                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The user's password hash is updated in the database.                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  A notification email is sent to the user confirming the password change.                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The user remains logged in (or is required to re-login, depending on policy).                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (Occurs periodically or upon user request).                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  Security Settings" page from the dashboard.                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The User clicks the "Change Password" button.                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system displays the "Change Password" form requiring:                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   Current Password                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   New Password                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   Confirm New Password                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The User enters the required information.                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 5.  The User clicks the "Update Password" button.                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 6.  The system validates that the "Current Password" matches the stored password hash.                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 7.  The system validates that the "New Password" meets the complexity requirements (e.g., min 8 chars, alphanumeric).                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 8.  The system validates that "New Password" and "Confirm New Password" match.                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 9.  The system updates the password hash in the database.                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 10. The system sends a confirmation email to the user's registered address.                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 11. The system displays a success message: "Şifreniz başarıyla güncellendi."                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 12. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  AC.1.STEP.3 (Mandatory Password Change):                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 1.  The User logs in (UC-0.1).                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The system detects that the user's password has expired or is a temporary password (from UC-7.7).                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system immediately redirects the User to the "Change Password" form (Step 3).                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The use case proceeds from Step 4.                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 5.  The User cannot navigate away until the password is changed.                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   EX.1 (Validation Failure - Weak Password):                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the system determines the new password is too weak.                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Yeni şifre güvenlik kriterlerini karşılamıyor (En az 8 karakter, büyük/küçük harf ve rakam içermelidir)."      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 3.                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | -   EX.2 (Validation Failure - Incorrect Current Password):                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the system determines the entered "Current Password" is incorrect.                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Mevcut şifreniz hatalı."                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 3.                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: Password complexity rules must be enforced (e.g., NIST guidelines or institutional policy).                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system should prevent the reuse of the last 3 passwords.                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The user remembers their current password. If not, they must use the "Forgot Password" flow (UC-0.1.AC.3).                                            |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | The specific password complexity policy should be configured in System Settings (UC-7.4).                                                             |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  3.1.0.2.3 Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Change Password (UC-0.3)

-   New password rules (complexity, length, matching fields) must be enforced consistently.

-   The system must update the stored password hash securely and atomically.

-   A clear success or error message must be shown immediately after submission.

-   Password changes must only be allowed for authenticated users.

-   Old and new passwords must never be exposed in logs or on the interface.

-   Password storage must follow secure hashing standards (e.g., salted hash).

-   The system must prevent reuse of recently used passwords if the policy requires it.

-   If validation fails (wrong current password, weak new password), the system must display a clear message and avoid making partial changes.

-   If the system requires mandatory password updates, the user must be redirected to this screen until the change is completed.

    1.  Use cases for user 1

        1.  Use case 1 for user 1

            1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file) 

  ---------------- ------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-1.1                                         
  Use Case Name:   Submit Application Form                        
  Created By:      Group 1                   Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Student                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Student to initiate a new transfer application, automatically populate data from external systems (YÖKSİS/ÖSYM), fill in required program information, and submit the initial form to the system.        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student has successfully authenticated and has an active session (Postcondition of UC-0.1).                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The system has verified that the official transfer application window is currently active.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The Student has not already submitted an application for the current period (as per policy).                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A unique Application ID is generated and associated with the Student's account.                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The application is saved in the system with the status "Pending Document Upload".                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The Student is automatically redirected to the "Document Upload" (UC-1.3) interface to continue the process.                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per student per application period.                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Student navigates to and selects the "Create New Transfer Application" option from their dashboard.                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the Yatay Geçiş Başvuru Formu.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The system includes UC-8.1, UC-8.2, and UC-8.3 to auto-populate known personal and academic data (e.g., Name, Surname from TCKN, ÖSYM scores, current university) by querying external APIs (NVI, YÖKSİS, ÖSYM). |
