|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 4.  The Student reviews the auto-populated data.                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 5.  The Student fills in the remaining mandatory fields (e.g., target department/program, target semester [3rd or 5th], current GPA).                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 6.  As the Student fills the form, the system performs real-time validation (e.g., GPA format, valid department selection).                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 7.  The Student clicks the "Save and Continue to Document Upload" button.                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 8.  The system performs a final validation of all mandatory fields.                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 9.  The system saves the form, generates a unique Application ID, and sets the application status to "Pending Document Upload".                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 10. The system redirects the Student to the Document Upload screen (See Postcondition 3).                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-1.1.AC.1.STEP.6 (Real-time Validation Fails):                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the Student enters data in an invalid format (e.g., a GPA of "1.5" which is below the 2.50 minimum, or selecting an invalid semester like "7th").                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The system immediately displays an inline error message next to the field (e.g., "Minimum GPA 2.50 olmalıdır" or "Sadece 3. ve 5. yarıyıllar seçilebilir").                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The "Save and Continue" button (Step 7) remains disabled until the error is corrected. The use case continues at step 5.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-1.1.AC.2.STEP.7 (Mandatory Fields Missing on Submit):                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the Student clicks "Save and Continue".                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  At step 8, the system detects one or more mandatory fields are empty.                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The system highlights all empty mandatory fields in red and displays a summary error message at the top (e.g., "Lütfen tüm zorunlu alanları doldurun.").                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The use case returns to step 5.                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-1.1.AC.3.STEP.7 (Student Saves as Draft):                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the Student clicks the "Save as Draft" button instead.                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The system saves all entered data.                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The application status is set to "Draft". No Application ID is finalized.                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The Student is returned to their main dashboard. The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |  EX.Global.2                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | -   Provide Identity Verification (Queries NVI/MERNİS)                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   Provide Academic Records (GPA, Active Semester) (Queries YÖKSİS)                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   Provide National Exam Score (YKS/ÖSYS) (Queries ÖSYM)                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: Must have real-time API integration with YÖKSİS and ÖSYM                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: Input validation rules (e.g., min. GPA 2.50/4.00, valid semesters 3rd or 5th) must be strictly enforced as per institutional policy.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: Department-specific criteria (e.g., checking for AA in Design Studio for Architecture) must be validated here. (This is part of AC.1).                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The business rules (valid semesters, minimum GPA, department-specific criteria) are configured in the system's backend.                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The student can only apply to one program per application period                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | 1.  The exact list of fields to be auto-populated vs. manually entered needs to be finalized.                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  Need to define the process if a student's auto-fetched YÖKSİS data is incorrect.                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Submit Application Form (UC-1.1)

-   Auto-population from external services (YÖKSİS/ÖSYM/NVI) must return data promptly or fall back to manual entry if unavailable.

-   The system must prevent submission until all required fields are completed and valid.

-   On submission, the system must save the application, generate an Application ID, and update its status reliably.

-   Auto-fetched data must be read-only unless external service errors require manual correction.

-   All communication with external data sources must be encrypted.

-   Only authenticated students may create or edit an application.

-   Validation rules (minimum GPA, allowed semesters, department rules) must be enforced consistently and server-side.

-   The system must prevent multiple active applications from the same student in the same period.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 1

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- --------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-1.2                                           
  Use Case Name:   Upload Required Documents                        
  Created By:      Group 1                     Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                  Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Student                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Student to upload all required supporting documents (e.g., Transcript, YKS Result, Curriculum) associated with their transfer application.                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student has successfully submitted the application form (Postcondition of UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  The Student's application status is "Pending Document Upload".                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 3.  The Student is on the "Document Upload" screen (having been redirected from UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  All mandatory document slots (e.g., Transcript, YKS) have a file successfully uploaded and validated by the system.                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  All uploaded files are associated with the Student's Application ID.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 3.  The application status is automatically updated to "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)".                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 4.  The Student is redirected to their application dashboard (UC-1.4: Track Application Status) and shown a success message.                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 5.  The application is now locked for student edits and enters the ÖİDB verification queue.                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per student per application period. (It’s first upload request.)                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The system displays the "Document Upload" interface. This interface shows a checklist of required documents (e.g., Transcript, YKS Result, Student Certificate, English Proficiency Proof, Curriculum, Course Contents, etc.).     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  The Student selects a document type from the checklist (e.g., "Transcript").                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 3.  The Student clicks "Upload File" for that document type.                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 4.  The Student selects a file (e.g., my_transcript.pdf) from their local device.                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 5.  The system performs a real-time validation on the file (e.g., checks for allowed formats like PDF/JPG/PNG, ensures file is under the max size limit (e.g., 10MB), and checks that the file is not corrupt or password-protected).  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 6.  The system successfully uploads the file.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 7.  The system automatically renames the file according to a standard convention (e.g., [AppID]_Transcript_[TCKN].pdf) and links it to the Application ID (as per report 3.4.B).                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the checklist item for "Transcript", marking it as "Uploaded" (e.g., with a green checkmark and the filename).                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 9.  The Student repeats steps 2-8 for all mandatory documents in the checklist.                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 10. Once all mandatory documents are marked as "Uploaded", the system enables the "Submit Final Application" button.                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 11. The Student clicks the "Submit Final Application" button.                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 12. The system performs a final check to ensure all required document slots are filled.                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 13. The system updates the application status to "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)" (Postcondition 3) and locks the application from further edits (Postcondition 5).                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 14. The system displays a success message ("Başvurunuz ve belgeleriniz başarıyla gönderildi. Başvuru durumunuzu 'Başvuru Takip' ekranından izleyebilirsiniz.") and redirects the Student to their main application dashboard (UC-1.4). |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-1.2.AC.1.STEP.5 (Invalid File Format or Size):                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the Student uploads a file that is in an unsupported format (e.g., .exe) or exceeds the maximum file size (e.g., 10MB).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     2.  The system rejects the file and displays an inline error message: "Geçersiz dosya formatı veya boyutu. Lütfen 10MB'ın altında PDF, JPG veya PNG formatında bir dosya yükleyin."                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to step 3 for that document.                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | -   UC-1.2.AC.2.STEP.5 (Corrupt or Password-Protected File):                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the system detects the file is corrupt or password-protected and cannot be opened.                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     2.  The system rejects the file and displays an error: "Dosya bozuk veya şifre korumalı. Lütfen dosyayı kontrol edip tekrar yükleyin."                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to step 3.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | -   UC-1.2.AC.3.STEP.3 (Student Re-uploads/Replaces a Document):                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     1.  The Student sees a document is already marked "Uploaded" (from the current or a previous session).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     2.  The Student clicks "Replace" (or "Re-upload") for that document item.                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     3.  The use case proceeds from step 4.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     4.  At step 7, the system saves the new file and marks the previous file as "Archived (Version 1)", thus maintaining a version history.                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | -   UC-1.2.AC.4.STEP.9 (Student Saves and Exits Before Final Submission):                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     1.  The Student uploads some, but not all, mandatory documents.                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     2.  The Student exits the page or clicks "Save and Exit" (without clicking "Submit Final Application").                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     3.  The system saves the uploaded files.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     4.  The application status remains "Pending Document Upload".                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     5.  When the Student returns to the application, they resume at step 1 of this use case, seeing their previously uploaded files.                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |  EX.Global.6                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must enforce strict file type restrictions (PDF, JPG, PNG) and a maximum file size (e.g., 10MB).                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must automatically rename all uploaded files to a standardized format (e.g., [AppID]_[DocType]_[TCKN].pdf).                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The system must maintain a version history of re-uploaded documents.                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The checklist of required documents is dynamically generated based on the Student's application type (e.g., "Architecture" applications will also require a "Portfolio" slot).                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  The "Submit Final Application" button (Step 11) is the final confirmation; after this, the student cannot edit the application unless it is returned by ÖİDB (triggering UC-1.3: Fix Returned Application).                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | The exact file size limit (e.g., 10MB) needs to be finalized.                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Upload Required Documents (UC-1.2)

-   The system must validate file type, size, and integrity after the file is selected.

-   All uploaded documents must be securely stored and correctly associated with the student's Application ID.

-   File names must be automatically standardized according to the system’s naming convention.

-   Once all required documents are uploaded, the system must allow final submission without delay.

-   Re-uploads must replace the previous file while preserving version history.

-   Only authenticated students may upload files for their own application.

-   The application must lock against further editing after final submission.

-   File uploads must be transferred over encrypted connections.

-   The system must prevent incomplete or partially uploaded files from being saved.

    1.  Use case 3 for user 1

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file) 

  ---------------- ----------------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-1.3                                                               
  Use Case Name:   Fix Returned Application (Correction Request)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                         Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                                      Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Student                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Student to correct and re-submit their application after it has been returned by the Student Affairs Office (ÖİDB) due to missing or invalid information/documents.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student's application status is "Returned for Correction" (This is the postcondition of UC-2.2: Return Application for Correction).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 2.  The Student has successfully logged in (UC-0.1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 3.  The application, which was previously locked, is now unlocked for editing.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The necessary corrections (document uploads or data changes) are saved.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 2.  The application status is updated back to "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 3.  The application is re-locked for student edits.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 4.  The application is placed back into the ÖİDB verification queue (triggering UC-2.1: Verify Application Intake again).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium (High for the student, but less frequent than initial submission)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Occurs only if an application is returned by ÖİDB.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Student logs into the system (UC-0.1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 2.  The system displays a prominent notification (e.g., on the dashboard or via email) that their application has been returned (triggered by UC-2.2).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 3.  The Student navigates to their application page (UC-1.4: Track Application Status).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the application status as "Returned for Correction" and clearly lists the reason(s) for return provided by ÖİDB (e.g., "Invalid Document: Transcript", "Missing Document: YKS Result", "Form Data Error: Invalid GPA").                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 5.  The system unlocks the specific sections of the application that require correction (e.g., the "Transcript" upload slot is marked "Re-upload Required").                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 6.  If a document is incorrect: a. The Student navigates to the "Document Upload" section (UC-1.2 interface). b. The Student clicks "Replace File" for the document marked as invalid. c. The Student uploads the new, corrected file. d. The system performs the standard file validation (format, size, etc.) as defined in UC-1.2. e. The system saves the new file (versioning the old one). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 7.  If form data is incorrect: a. The Student navigates to the "Application Form" section (UC-1.1 interface). b. The Student corrects the information in the unlocked data field (e.g., re-types GPA). c. The system performs real-time validation on the field.                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 8.  After all corrections listed by ÖİDB are addressed, the Student clicks the "Re-submit Application" button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 9.  The system validates that all mandatory fields/documents are now filled.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 10. The system saves the changes, updates the status to "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)", and re-locks the application (Postconditions 2, 3).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 11. The Student is redirected to their application dashboard (UC-1.4), where the status is now updated.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-1.3.AC.1.STEP.6 (Student Uploads Another Invalid File):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |     1.  At step 6.d, the Student attempts to upload a replacement file that is also invalid (e.g., wrong format, corrupt).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |     2.  The system rejects the file and displays the same validation error as in UC-1.2.AC.1 ("Geçersiz dosya formatı...").                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to step 6.b.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | -   UC-1.3.AC.2.STEP.8 (Student Fails to Correct All Errors):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |     1.  At step 8, the Student clicks "Re-submit Application", but has not addressed all the issues flagged by ÖİDB.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error message: "Lütfen ÖİDB tarafından belirtilen tüm hataları düzelttiğinizden emin olun: [Hata_Listesi]".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to step 5.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must clearly and unambiguously display the exact reasons for rejection (as entered by ÖİDB in UC-2.2) to the Student.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must only unlock the specific fields or document slots that ÖİDB has marked for correction. Other data must remain locked.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: All re-uploaded documents must be versioned, preserving the original (rejected) file for auditing.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  ÖİDB provides a clear, structured reason for returning the application.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | 2.  The Student receives a notification (e.g., email) that their application was returned.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Fix Returned Application (UC-1.3)
