-   Only the fields or document slots marked by ÖİDB must be unlocked for editing; all others must remain read-only.

-   Replacement document uploads must be validated and saved without delay.

-   Previous document versions must be archived automatically when a new version is uploaded.

-   The system must prevent resubmission until all identified issues are fully corrected.

-   Upon resubmission, the application must be saved reliably and re-locked against further edits.

-   Only authenticated students may access and correct a returned application.

-   All corrected documents and updated fields must be securely stored and linked to the original Application ID.

    1.  Use case 4 for user 1

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)  

  ---------------- -------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-1.4                                          
  Use Case Name:   Track Application Status                        
  Created By:      Group 1                    Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                 Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- -------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Student                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Student to view the real-time status and progress of their submitted transfer application through a visual timeline or dashboard.                                      |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student has successfully logged in (UC-0.1).                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The Student has at least saved a draft application (Postcondition of UC-1.1.AC.3) or submitted a full application (Postcondition of UC-1.2).                                   |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The Student is informed of the application's current processing stage.                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The Student can view the history of their application's progress.                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High. The student may check this multiple times a day while their application is in process.                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Student successfully logs into the system (UC-0.1).                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The system automatically directs the Student to their main "Application Dashboard".                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The dashboard displays the Student's most recent application (or a list of applications if drafts are saved).                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the current, high-level status of the application (e.g., "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)", "In Review (YDYO)", "In Review (YGK)", "Final Decision Complete"). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 5.  The Student clicks on the "View Details" or "Track Application" link for their application.                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 6.  The system displays a detailed application tracking page.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 7.  This page includes a visual "timeline" (süreç dökümü) showing all past, current, and future processing steps.                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 8.  The timeline clearly marks completed steps (with timestamps) and the current active step.                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     -   Example Timeline Entry (Completed): "Başvuru Gönderildi - 15.11.2025, 14:30"                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     -   Example Timeline Entry (Completed): "ÖİDB İlk Doğrulama Tamamlandı - 16.11.2025, 10:15"                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     -   Example Timeline Entry (Active): "YDYO Dil Yeterlilik Değerlendirmesi"                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     -   Example Timeline Entry (Pending): "YGK Akademik Değerlendirme"                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     -   Example Timeline Entry (Pending): "Fakülte Kurulu Onayı"                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 9.  The use case successfully concludes as the Student is now informed of their status (Postcondition 1).                                                                          |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-1.4.AC.1.STEP.4 (Application Returned for Correction):                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 4, the system displays the application status as "Returned for Correction".                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The dashboard shows a prominent warning and a "Düzeltme Yap" (Make Correction) button.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  When the Student clicks this button, the system initiates UC-1.3: Fix Returned Application.                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | -   UC-1.4.AC.2.STEP.4 (Application Not Yet Submitted - Draft):                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 4, the system displays the application status as "Draft (Pending Document Upload)".                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The dashboard displays a "Başvuruya Devam Et" (Continue Application) button.                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  When the Student clicks this button, the system initiates UC-1.2: Upload Required Documents.                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | -   UC-1.4.AC.3.STEP.4 (Final Result is Ready):                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 4, the system displays the application status as "Final Decision Complete" or "Sonuç Açıklandı".                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The dashboard displays a "Sonucu Görüntüle" (View Result) button.                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  When the Student clicks this button, the system initiates UC-1.5: View Final Result.                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-1.4.EX.1 (Status Service Fails):                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 1.  At step 4 or 7, the system fails to retrieve the application's current status from the database or workflow engine.                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error message: "Başvuru durumu bilgisi alınamadı. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin. (Hata Kodu: 501-STAT)"                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a read-only "view" use case.)                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The application status must be updated in real-time as other actors (ÖİDB, YDYO, YGK) complete their respective use cases.                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The timeline visualization must be clear, simple, and easy for a non-technical user to understand.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: All status names (e.g., "Pending Verification", "In Review") must be standardized and used consistently across the entire system.                                        |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | A central database table or workflow engine logs every status change with a timestamp, which this use case reads from.                                                             |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]1)

[]2)

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Track Application Status (UC-1.4)

-   The system must retrieve and display the current application status without noticeable delay.

-   Any new status updates made by administrative units must appear promptly on the student’s dashboard.

-   Only authenticated students may view their own application status.

-   Students must not see internal reviewer comments—only high-level statuses and timestamps.

-   Status names must be standardized and used consistently across the entire system.

    1.  Use case 5 for user 1

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file) 

  ---------------- ------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-1.5                                   
  Use Case Name:   View Final Result                        
  Created By:      Group 1             Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025          Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Student                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Student to view their final application result (Asil/Yedek/Red) and the associated digital course equivalence (İntibak) table after the evaluation process is complete and results are published. |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student has successfully logged in (UC-0.1).                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The application results have been officially published by ÖİDB (This is the postcondition of UC-2.5: Publish Results, which is triggered by UC-6.5: Confirm Final List for Publication).                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The Student is on their Application Dashboard (UC-1.4) and sees the status "Sonuç Açıklandı" (Results Published).                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The Student is informed of their final status (e.g., "Asil", "Yedek", "Red").                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  If admitted ("Asil"), the Student has viewed their digital course equivalence (İntibak) table.                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The Student may choose to proceed to UC-1.6: Submit Appeal.                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (multiple checks) per student, once results are announced.                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Student logs into the system (UC-0.1) and navigates to the dashboard (UC-1.4).                                                                                                                        |
| (Admitted - Asil)        |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The dashboard displays the application status as "Sonuç Açıklandı".                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The Student clicks the "Sonucu Görüntüle" (View Result) button (as described in UC-1.4.AC.3).                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the "Final Result" page.                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 5.  The system shows a clear congratulatory message and the final status: "Asil" (Admitted).                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 6.  The system displays a button or link: "İntibak Tablosunu Görüntüle" (View Course Equivalence Table).                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 7.  The Student clicks the link.                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 8.  The system displays the digital course equivalence (İntibak) table prepared by the YGK (from UC-4.5) and approved by the Faculty Board (from UC-6.2).                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 9.  The Student reviews their result and intibak table. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-1.5.AC.1.STEP.5 (Result is "Yedek" - Waitlisted):                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the system displays the final status: "Yedek" (Waitlisted).                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the Student's waitlist rank (e.g., "3. Yedek").                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The system does not display an intibak table at this stage.                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     4.  The system displays information about the waitlist process.                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     5.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | -   UC-1.5.AC.2.STEP.5 (Result is "Red" - Rejected):                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the system displays the final status: "Reddedildi" (Rejected).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the primary reason for rejection as noted by the YGK/Faculty Board (e.g., "Yetersiz Puan", "Dil Yeterliliği Sağlanamadı", "Bölüm Koşulları Sağlanamadı").                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The system may display a button/link to "İtiraz Et" (Submit Appeal).                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     4.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | -   UC-1.5.AC.3 (Student Proceeds to Appeal):                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  After viewing the result (e.g., in AC.1 or AC.2), the Student decides to appeal.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The Student clicks the "İtiraz Et" (Submit Appeal) button displayed on the results page.                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-1.7: Submit Appeal.                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-1.6.EX.1 (Intibak Table Not Found):                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 7 (Normal Course), the Student is "Asil" but the system fails to retrieve the associated intibak table (from UC-4.5) due to a database link error or file corruption.                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the "Asil" result but shows an error: "İntibak tablonuz görüntülenemiyor. Lütfen durumu ÖİDB'ye bildirin. (Hata Kodu: 601-INT)"                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The use case concludes (partially successful).                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | -   UC-1.6.EX.2 (Result Service Fails):                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Student clicks "View Result", but the system fails to retrieve the final status from the database.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Sonuçlar getirilemedi. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin. (Hata Kodu: 602-DB)"                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a read-only "view" use case that presents data created by UC-4.5, UC-6.2, and UC-2.5).                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The result (Asil/Yedek/Red) must be displayed clearly and unambiguously.                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The digital intibak table must be presented in a clean, readable, and printable format.                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: Rejection reasons, if displayed, must be standardized terms.                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The final results (Asil/Yedek/Red) and the intibak table (for "Asil" students) are finalized and approved by the Faculty Board (UC-6.2) before being published by ÖİDB (UC-2.5).                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  "Yedek" (Waitlisted) students do not see a preliminary intibak table unless they are later moved to "Asil".                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: View Final Result (UC-1.5)

-   If the student is admitted, the digital course equivalence (İntibak) table must be shown accurately and fully.

-   Only authenticated students may access their final result.

-   The student must not have access to internal evaluation notes—only finalized outcome data.

    1.  Use case 6 for user 1

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-1.6                                             
  Use Case Name:   Submit Appeal (İtiraz Etme)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                       Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                    Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Student                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Student to submit a formal appeal regarding their final application result (e.g., "Reddedildi" or "Yedek") and provide supporting text and documents. |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student has viewed their final result (UC-1.5).                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The application results are officially published.                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The official appeal submission period (e.g., 5 business days after results) is active (this period is set by UC-7.2).                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The appeal, including the justification text and any supporting documents, is saved and associated with the Application ID.                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The application status is updated to "Pending Appeal Review (ÖİDB)".                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The appeal is routed to the ÖİDB review queue (triggering UC-2.6: Review and Respond to Appeals).                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 4.  The Student is redirected to their application dashboard (UC-1.4), where the new status is visible.                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (only occurs if students choose to appeal).                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Student is on the "Final Result" screen (UC-1.5).                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The Student clicks the "İtiraz Et" (Submit Appeal) button (as described in UC-1.5.AC.3).                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The system navigates the Student to the "Submit Appeal" page.                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the Application ID and the result being appealed.                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 5.  The Student fills in the mandatory "İtiraz Gerekçesi" (Reason for Appeal) text field, explaining their reasoning.                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 6.  The Student optionally clicks "Destekleyici Belge Yükle" (Upload Supporting Document).                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 7.  The system provides a file upload interface (using the same validation rules as UC-1.2).                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 8.  The Student selects and uploads a new document (e.g., a grade report, a screenshot, a calculation).                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 9.  The system validates the file (format, size) and attaches it to the appeal.                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 10. The Student clicks the "İtirazı Gönder" (Submit Appeal) button.                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 11. The system validates that the mandatory "İtiraz Gerekçesi" field (Step 5) is not empty.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 12. The system saves the appeal, updates the application status to "Pending Appeal Review (ÖİDB)", and routes it to the ÖİDB queue (Postconditions 1, 2, 3).      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 13. The system displays a success message: "İtirazınız başarıyla kaydedildi. Kararınız, 'Başvuru Takip' ekranından izleyebilirsiniz."                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 14. The system redirects the Student to their application dashboard (UC-1.4).                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-1.6.AC.1.STEP.2 (Appeal Period is Closed):                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, the Student clicks the "İtiraz Et" button, but the official appeal deadline has passed.                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     2.  The system displays a message: "Resmi itiraz süresi (xx.xx.xxxx) tarihinde sona ermiştir. Artık itirazda bulunulamaz."                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     3.  The "İtiraz Et" button is disabled. The use case terminates.                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | -   UC-1.6.AC.2.STEP.9 (Invalid Supporting Document):                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     1.  At step 9, the Student attempts to upload a file that is in an unsupported format (e.g., .zip) or exceeds the size limit.                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     2.  The system rejects the file and displays an error (e.g., "Geçersiz dosya formatı...").                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to step 6.                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | -   UC-1.6.AC.3.STEP.10 (Appeal Submitted Without Document):                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     1.  At step 10, the Student clicks "İtirazı Gönder" after filling in the text (Step 5) but without uploading a document (Step 8 is skipped).                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     2.  The system accepts this, as the supporting document is optional.                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     3.  The use case proceeds to step 11.                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-1.7.EX.1 (Appeal Save Error):                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 1.  At step 12, the system fails to save the appeal text or documents to the database.                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "İtirazınız kaydedilemedi. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin. (Hata Kodu: 701-DB)"                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The appeal submission must be logged with an immutable timestamp for auditing purposes.                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must enforce the appeal deadline, which is configurable by the System Admin (via UC-7.2 or UC-7.4).                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The file upload mechanism must follow the same rules (format, size, versioning) as defined in UC-1.3.                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  Students who are "Asil" (Admitted) generally cannot appeal their admission result, but this flow is available for "Reddedildi" and "Yedek" students.          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The "İtiraz Gerekçesi" text field is mandatory, but supporting documents are optional.                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Submit Appeal (UC-1.6)

-   Supporting documents (optional) must be uploaded and validated without noticeable delay.

-   Invalid or unsupported files must be rejected with a clear inline error message.

-   Appeal submission must reliably save the text, uploaded documents, and updated status together.

-   Only authenticated and eligible students (Rejected / Waitlisted) may submit an appeal.

-   All communication and file uploads must use encrypted connections.

-   Once the appeal is submitted, the application must be locked from further edits.

-   The system must redirect the student back to their dashboard after a successful submission

    1.  Use cases for user 2

        1.  Use case 1 for user 2

            1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)  

  ---------------- --------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-2.1                                           
  Use Case Name:   Verify Application Intake                        
  Created By:      Group 1                     Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                  Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | ÖİDB Officer (Student Affairs Office Staff)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the ÖİDB Officer to perform the initial verification of a student's submitted application form and all associated documents for completeness, basic validity, and authenticity.                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Student has successfully submitted their application and documents (Postcondition of UC-1.2).                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  The ÖİDB Officer has successfully logged into the system (with ÖİDB-level permissions).                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application status is updated to "Intake Verified" (or "Intake Verified - Pending Language").                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The application is now ready to be routed to the next stages, enabling UC-2.3 (Forward to YDYO) and UC-2.4 (Forward to Dean's Office).                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application submitted to the system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The ÖİDB Officer logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the ÖİDB Dashboard, showing a queue of applications with the status "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)".                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  The ÖİDB Officer selects or is assigned an application from the queue and opens it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the "Intake Verification" screen. This screen shows:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   The student's submitted form data (from UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   All uploaded documents (from UC-1.2).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Automated pre-check results (e.g., "Min. GPA Met: YES", "Valid Semester: YES").                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 5.  The system automatically includes UC-8.4 (Validate Document Authenticity) in the background. It checks for e-Devlet barcodes or QR codes on documents (like Transcript, Student Certificate) and displays a "Doğrulandı" (Verified) or "Manuel Kontrol Gerekli" (Manual Check Required) icon next to them. |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 6.  The ÖİDB Officer manually reviews the documents for completeness and correctness:                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Compares data on the Transcript (GPA, name) with the data entered in the form (UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Verifies the YKS Result document matches the auto-fetched ÖSYM data (UC-8.3).                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Ensures the Curriculum and Course Contents documents are readable and for the correct university.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Checks if an English Proficiency document is uploaded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
