|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 7.  After verifying all data is complete and authentic, the ÖİDB Officer clicks the "Mark as Verified" (Onayla ve İlet) button.                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the application status to "Intake Verified" (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 9.  The application is now removed from the "Pending Verification" queue and moves to the "Ready for Routing" queue (enabling UC-2.3 and UC-2.4). The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-2.1.AC.1.STEP.6 (Application Returned for Correction):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the ÖİDB Officer identifies a problem (e.g., Transcript is unreadable, YKS document is missing, form GPA does not match transcript).                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     2.  The ÖİDB Officer clicks the "Return for Correction" (Düzeltme İçin Geri Gönder) button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-2.2: Return Application for Correction, which will prompt the officer to select a reason and notify the student.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     4.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | -   UC-2.1.AC.2.STEP.6 (Application Rejected at Intake):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the ÖİDB Officer identifies a critical, non-correctable error (e.g., student is from an ineligible university, application is fraudulent).                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     2.  The ÖİDB Officer clicks the "Reject Application" (Başvuruyu Reddet) button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     3.  The system prompts for a mandatory rejection reason.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     4.  The application status is set to "Rejected (ÖİDB)" and the student is notified.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     5.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | Validate Document Authenticity (This is a key automated step that assists the officer's manual review).                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must provide a clear, side-by-side view of the student's entered form data and the content of their uploaded documents to make comparison easy.                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must log which ÖİDB Officer verified which application and at what time for auditing.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The ÖİDB Officer has the training and authority to make initial intake decisions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The "Pre-Screening" (min. GPA, valid semester) was already automated in UC-1.1, so the ÖİDB Officer's primary role is document authenticity and completeness verification.                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Verify Application Intake (UC-2.1)

-   All rule validations (GPA, semester, missing documents, department requirements) must execute reliably and return results immediately.

-   Any eligibility decision (Eligible / Not Eligible) must be saved securely and atomically.

-   Only authorized staff may access and update eligibility for assigned applications.

-   Decision results must update the application’s status and reflect immediately on the student’s dashboard.

-   The system must prevent duplicate or conflicting eligibility decisions.

-   All actions must occur over encrypted connections and follow authorization rules.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 2

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)  

  ---------------- ----------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-2.2                                                   
  Use Case Name:   Return Application for Correction                        
  Created By:      Group 1                             Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                          Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | ÖİDB Officer (Student Affairs Office Staff)                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the ÖİDB Officer to send an application back to the student for correction, specifying which documents or data fields are missing, invalid, or incorrect.             |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The ÖİDB Officer is actively reviewing an application (i.e., performing UC-2.1: Verify Application Intake).                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The application status is "Pending Verification (ÖİDB)".                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The Officer has identified a correctable error.                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application status is updated to "Returned for Correction".                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The application (or specific fields/documents) is unlocked for the Student to edit.                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The correction reasons are logged against the application's history.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 4.  An automated notification is sent to the Student.                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 5.  This action (and its postconditions) triggers the start of UC-1.3: Fix Returned Application.                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Occurs only when applications contain correctable errors.                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  While performing UC-2.1, the ÖİDB Officer identifies an error (e.g., unreadable transcript, missing document, data mismatch).                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The Officer clicks the "Return for Correction" (Düzeltme İçin Geri Gönder) button (as described in UC-2.1.AC.1).                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a "Reason for Return" (Geri Gönderme Nedeni) modal or interface.                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 4.  The system displays a checklist of application fields and documents (e.g., "Form: GPA", "Document: Transcript", "Document: YKS Result").                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 5.  The ÖİDB Officer selects the specific item(s) that are incorrect (e.g., clicks on "Document: Transcript").                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 6.  The Officer selects a standardized reason from a dropdown (e.g., "Belge Okunaksız", "Geçersiz Belge", "Eksik Sayfa") or types a mandatory short note.                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 7.  The Officer repeats steps 5-6 for all identified errors.                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 8.  The Officer clicks the final "Send Back to Student" (Öğrenciye Gönder) button.                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 9.  The system updates the application status to "Returned for Correction" (Postcondition 1).                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 10. The system logs the specific reasons (e.g., "Transcript: Belge Okunaksız") for the student to see (Postcondition 3).                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 11. The system automatically sends a notification (email and/or dashboard alert) to the Student (Postcondition 4).                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 12. The use case concludes, (triggering UC-1.3).                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-2.2.AC.1.STEP.8 (Officer Returns Without Specifying Reason):                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 8, the Officer clicks "Send Back to Student" but has not selected any items or provided a reason (Step 5 or 6).                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Lütfen en az bir belge veya alan seçip, geri gönderme nedeni belirtin."                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to step 3.                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-2.2.EX.1 (Notification Service Fails):                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 1.  At step 11, the system successfully updates the application status ("Returned for Correction") but fails to send the automated email notification to the student.         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The system logs the notification failure, but the use case continues and concludes successfully. The primary action (status change) is complete.                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must require the ÖİDB Officer to provide a structured reason (e.g., selecting the specific document that is wrong) rather than just a generic text note. |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must log which ÖİDB Officer returned the application and the reasons they provided.                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | A standardized list of "return reasons" (Okunaksız, Eksik, vb.) is configured in the system (by UC-7.4).                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is the trigger for UC-1.3. The Postconditions of UC-2.2 must perfectly match the Preconditions of UC-1.3.                                                       |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Return Application for Correction (UC-2.2)

-   The Officer must be required to choose at least one item and a reason before submission.

-   Submitting the return action must reliably update the application status and save all selected reasons.

-   Status update and reason logging must be completed together and not allow partial saves.

-   Only authenticated ÖİDB Officers may perform this action.

-   The system must prevent returning applications that are not in the appropriate workflow state.

-   All communication and updates must occur over secure connections.

-   Notification to the student should be triggered after a successful status update, without blocking the main action.

-   Reasons displayed to the student must exactly match the selections made by the Officer.

-   All return actions must be logged with the responsible Officer and selected reasons.

    1.  Use case 3 for user 2

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-2.3                                                                 
  Use Case Name:   Forward Application to Foreign Languages (YDYO)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                           Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                                        Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | ÖİDB Officer (Student Affairs Office Staff)                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the ÖİDB Officer to route an application (that has passed initial intake) to the Foreign Languages Department (YDYO) for English proficiency evaluation.                                                          |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The application has successfully passed initial verification (Postcondition of UC-2.1: Verify Application Intake).                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "Intake Verified".                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The ÖİDB Officer is on the "Ready for Routing" or "All Applications" dashboard.                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The application requires a language proficiency check (e.g., student uploaded a language certificate, or is from a non-exempt institution).                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application status is updated to "In Review (YDYO)" (veya "Pending Language Verification").                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The application appears in the YDYO Officer's work queue.                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  This action (and its postconditions) triggers the start of UC-3.1: Review Language Proficiency Document.                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The application remains available for ÖİDB to route to the Dean's Office (for parallel processing via UC-2.4).                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application that requires a language check.                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The ÖİDB Officer logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The Officer navigates to the queue of applications with the status "Intake Verified" (the post-UC-2.1 queue).                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The ÖİDB Officer identifies an application that requires YDYO review (e.g., by filtering for "Has Language Document: Yes").                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The Officer selects the specific application (or multiple applications in batch).                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 5.  The Officer clicks the "Forward to YDYO" (YDYO'ya Yönlendir) button.                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 6.  The system displays a confirmation prompt.                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 7.  The Officer confirms the action.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the application's status to "In Review (YDYO)" (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 9.  The system adds the application to the YDYO dashboard/queue (Postcondition 2), triggering UC-3.1.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-2.3.AC.1.STEP.3 (Application Does Not Require Language Check):                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the ÖİDB Officer identifies an application that is exempt from language verification (e.g., student is transferring from a university in an English-speaking country or another 100% English program). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The Officer does not perform this use case (UC-2.3).                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  The Officer only performs UC-2.4: Forward Application to Dean's Office. The application's language status is marked "Exempt (by ÖİDB)".                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | -   UC-2.3.AC.2 (Application Sent in Parallel):                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  The ÖİDB Officer, after verifying the application (UC-2.1), decides to route the application to YDYO and the Dean's Office at the same time.                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The Officer first performs this use case (UC-2.3).                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  Immediately after, the Officer performs UC-2.4: Forward Application to Dean's Office.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     4.  The application status becomes "In Review (YDYO)" and "In Review (YGK)" simultaneously, allowing parallel evaluation.                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | UC-2.3.EX.2 (YDYO Queue Error):                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 1.  At step 9, the status updates, but the system fails to add the application to the YDYO work queue.                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The system logs the error and flags the application for a System Admin to manually re-queue.                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The Officer is notified: "Durum güncellendi ancak YDYO kuyruğuna eklenemedi. Lütfen sistem yöneticisine bildirin. (Hata Kodu: 232-QUEUE)"                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The use case terminates (partially successful).                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must allow ÖİDB to clearly see which applications have been sent to YDYO and which have not.                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system should ideally support parallel processing, allowing UC-2.3 (to YDYO) and UC-2.4 (to Dean's Office) to be executed independently after UC-2.1 is complete.                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The ÖİDB Officer makes the determination of who needs YDYO verification. (In a future version, this could be automated based on rules).                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The YDYO evaluation and the YGK evaluation can happen at the same time (parallel process).                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Forward Application to Foreign Languages (YDYO) (UC-2.3)

-   Only ÖİDB Officers with the correct role may forward applications to YDYO.

-   The system must allow forwarding only for applications in the “Intake Verified” state.

-   The action must update the application’s status and place it in the YDYO queue correctly.

-   Applications exempt from YDYO must be recognized and prevented from being forwarded.

-   Batch forwarding must apply the correct status and queue assignment to all selected applications.

-   All forwarding actions must be logged with Officer ID, Application ID, and timestamp.

-   The interface must allow filtering and selecting applications for routing.

    1.  Use case 4 for user 2

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file) 

  ---------------- -------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-2.4                                                      
  Use Case Name:   Forward Application to Dean's Office                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025                             Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- -------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | ÖİDB Officer (Student Affairs Office Staff)                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the ÖİDB Officer to route an application (that has passed initial intake) to the responsible Faculty's Dean's Office for academic evaluation by the Departmental Transfer Commission (YGK). |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The application has successfully passed initial verification (Postcondition of UC-2.1: Verify Application Intake).                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "Intake Verified".                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  The ÖİDB Officer is on the "Ready for Routing" or "All Applications" dashboard.                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application status is updated to "In Review (YGK)" (veya "Pending YGK Review").                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The application appears in the work queue of the appropriate Faculty Dean's Office.                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  This action (and its postconditions) enables the Dean's Office use case (UC-5.1) "Forward to YGK", which in turn triggers UC-4.1: Review Academic Eligibility.                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every verified application.                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The ÖİDB Officer logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The Officer navigates to the queue of applications with the status "Intake Verified" (the post-UC-2.1 queue).                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  The Officer identifies an application that is ready for academic review.                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 4.  The Officer selects the specific application (or multiple applications in batch for the same faculty).                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 5.  The Officer clicks the "Forward to Dean's Office" (Dekanlığa Yönlendir) button.                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 6.  The system displays a confirmation prompt (perhaps asking to confirm the Faculty, e.g., "Mühendislik Fakültesi").                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 7.  The Officer confirms the action.                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the application's status to "In Review (YGK)" (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 9.  The system adds the application to the appropriate Dean's Office dashboard/queue (Postcondition 2).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-2.4.AC.1 (Application Sent in Parallel):                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     1.  The ÖİDB Officer, after verifying the application (UC-2.1), decides to route the application to YDYO and the Dean's Office at the same time.                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     2.  The Officer first performs UC-2.3: Forward to YDYO.                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     3.  Immediately after, the Officer performs this use case (UC-2.4).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     4.  The application status becomes "In Review (YDYO)" and "In Review (YGK)" simultaneously, allowing parallel evaluation.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | -   UC-2.4.AC.2 (Application Sent Serially - YDYO First):                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     1.  (Assuming a serial process) The Officer performs UC-2.3 and waits for YDYO to complete their review (UC-3.x).                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     2.  The application status returns from YDYO (e.g., "Language Approved").                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     3.  The Officer now performs this use case (UC-2.4) to send it to the Dean's Office.                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | UC-2.4.EX.2 (Dean's Office Queue Error):                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 1.  At step 9, the status updates, but the system fails to add the application to the Dean's Office work queue.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The system logs the error and flags the application for a System Admin (UC-7.x) to manually re-queue.                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  The Officer is notified: "Durum güncellendi ancak Dekanlık kuyruğuna eklenemedi. Lütfen sistem yöneticisine bildirin. (Hata Kodu: 242-QUEUE)"                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 4.  The use case terminates (partially successful).                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must automatically determine the correct Faculty/Dean's Office based on the student's target department (from UC-1.1).                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must allow ÖİDB to clearly see which applications have been sent to the Dean's Office and which have not.                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The academic evaluation (YGK) and language evaluation (YDYO) can happen in parallel.                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The Dean's Office acts as a "router" or "gatekeeper" that receives the application from ÖİDB and formally passes it to the correct YGK (Department Commission).                                 |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Forward Application to Dean's Office (UC-2.4)

-   Only authorized ÖİDB Officers may forward applications to the Dean’s Office.

-   The system must allow forwarding only for applications in the “Intake Verified” state.

-   Forwarding must correctly update the application’s status to “In Review (YGK)”.

-   The application must be placed in the correct Dean’s Office queue based on the target department.

-   Batch forwarding must apply the correct status and queue assignment to all selected applications.

-   Applications must not be forwarded to the wrong faculty; the system must enforce faculty–department consistency.

-   YDYO and Dean’s Office forwarding must be compatible with parallel or serial evaluation flows.

-   All routing actions must be logged with Officer ID, Application ID, and timestamp.

    1.  Use case 5 for user 2

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-2.5                                 
  Use Case Name:   Publish Results                        
  Created By:      Group 1           Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    15.11.2025        Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | ÖİDB Officer (Student Affairs Office Staff)                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the ÖİDB Officer to officially publish the final, Faculty Board-approved admission results (Asil/Yedek/Red) to the students' dashboards.                                                                         |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Faculty Board has given its final approval and confirmed the lists are ready for publication (Postcondition of UC-6.5: Confirm Final List for Publication).                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  The ÖİDB Officer has successfully logged in (with ÖİDB-level permissions).                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  The application status is "Approved (Faculty Board)" or "Ready for Publication".                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application results (Asil/Yedek/Red) and associated intibak tables (for "Asil" students) are made visible to the students.                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  The application status is updated to "Results Published" (veya "Sonuç Açıklandı").                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  An automated notification (email and/or dashboard alert) is sent to all applicants.                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 4.  This action (and its postconditions) enables UC-1.5: View Final Result for all students.                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
