|                          |     5.  The system saves the "Exempt" decision, updates the language status to "Language Approved (Exempt)", and notifies ÖİDB (Postconditions).                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | -   UC-3.1.AC.3.STEP.9 (Officer Adds a Comment):                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     1.  At step 9 (Normal Flow), or step 3 (in AC.1/AC.2), the Officer needs to add a comment.                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     2.  The Officer types a comment in the "Notes for ÖİDB/YGK" (Açıklamalar) text area.                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     3.  The system saves this note along with the final decision when "Submit Decision" is clicked.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | -   UC-3.1.AC.4.STEP.5 (Officer Downloads Document):                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the document is complex or requires offline verification.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     2.  The Officer clicks the "Download Document" button.                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     3.  The system provides the file for download.                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     4.  The use case continues at step 6.                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: YDYO Officers must only see data relevant to language review (e.g., Name, TCKN, Language Document) and not the full application (e.g., GPA, YKS) to ensure privacy and separation of concerns. |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must provide easy access (e.g., a modal or link) to the university's official language requirement rules (e.g., "Hangi sınavdan kaç puan gerekiyor?").                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: "Unsuccessful" and "Exempt" decisions must require a mandatory comment/note.                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The YDYO Officer has the expertise and authority to validate foreign language certificates and exemption rules.                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  The YDYO decision is final for the language requirement. If a student fails this step, the YGK (UC-4.x) may automatically reject them.                                                               |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirement

Use Case: Review Language Proficiency Document (UC-3.1)

-   Only authorized YDYO Officers may access and evaluate applications assigned to the YDYO queue.

-   The system must clearly display the student’s language document, exemption information, and previous intake verification notes.

-   The Officer must be able to mark the evaluation outcome (Approved / Failed / Exempt) in a single, consistent action.

-   The recorded evaluation result must immediately update the application’s status and become visible to ÖİDB.

-   The system must prevent submitting an incomplete evaluation (e.g., missing decision or justification where required).

-   All YDYO evaluation actions must be logged with Officer ID, Application ID, timestamp, and decision details.

-   Sensitive documents (language certificates, evaluation notes) must be accessible only to authorized staff.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 3

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ---------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-3.2                                                        
  Use Case Name:   Filter and View All Language Decisions                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                  Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    16.11.2025                               Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ---------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YDYO Officer (Foreign Languages Department Staff)                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YDYO Officer to view a comprehensive list of all applications routed to YDYO, and filter this list based on their language decision status (e.g., Pending, Successful, Failed). |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The YDYO Officer has successfully logged in (with YDYO-level permissions).                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 2.  There is at least one application in the system that has been routed to YDYO (i.e., UC-2.3 has been performed at least once).                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The YDYO Officer has viewed a filtered or complete list of language decisions.                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 2.  The YDYO Officer may have identified an application for re-evaluation.                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Daily (or multiple times per day) by YDYO staff during the evaluation period.                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The YDYO Officer logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 2.  The Officer navigates to the "YDYO Dashboard" or "All Language Applications" (Tüm Dil Başvuruları) screen.                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 3.  By default, the system displays the list of applications "Pending Review" (as in UC-3.1, Normal Flow, Step 2).                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 4.  The Officer uses the "Filter" (Filtrele) controls on the dashboard.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 5.  The Officer selects a filter status from the options (e.g., "Successful" (Başarılı), "Unsuccessful" (Başarısız), "Exempt" (Muaf), "Pending" (Beklemede), or "All" (Tümü)).              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 6.  The Officer clicks the "Apply Filter" button.                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 7.  The system queries the database and displays the filtered list of applications, showing columns like "Student Name", "Application ID", "Status", "Decision Date", "Officer Name".       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 8.  The YDYO Officer reviews the list.                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes as the Officer has viewed the list (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-3.2.AC.1.STEP.8 (Officer Initiates Re-evaluation):                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 1.  At step 8, while reviewing the list (e.g., a "Successful" list), the Officer notices a potential error or wishes to re-evaluate a decision.                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 2.  The Officer clicks on the Application ID for that student.                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 3.  The system opens the "Language Verification" screen for that application (the UC-3.1 interface).                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 4.  The Officer can now perform the steps of UC-3.1 again (e.g., change the status from "Successful" to "Unsuccessful").                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 5.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a read-only "view" use case that can trigger UC-3.1.)                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The dashboard must provide robust filtering options (by status, date, or even Officer name).                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The list must be searchable or sortable by Student Name or Application ID.                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The YDYO Officer has permission to view all decisions, not just their own. (This may need confirmation based on roles defined in UC-7.1).                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | 2.  Decisions can be changed (re-evaluated) via AC.1 before the YGK/Faculty Board makes a final decision.                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is the "dashboard" or "reporting" view for the YDYO actor, whereas UC-3.1 is the "action" view for a single application.                                                      |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Filter and View All Language Decisions (UC-3.2)

-   Only authorized YDYO Officers may view and respond to student clarification messages.

-   Officers must be able to provide a reply or request additional information in a single, consistent action.

-   Message exchanges must be stored as part of the application record and must remain accessible to ÖİDB.

-   All clarification messages and officer replies must be logged with Officer ID, Application ID, timestamp, and message content.

    1.  Use cases for user 4

        1.  Use case 1 for user 4

            1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.1                                             
  Use Case Name:   Review Academic Eligibility                        
  Created By:      Group 1                       Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    16.11.2025                    Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to perform the initial academic review of an application, check general eligibility (GPA, semester) against automated checks, and mark the application as "Eligible" or "Not Eligible" for further evaluation. |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The application has been forwarded by the Dean's Office to the YGK queue (Postcondition of UC-5.1: Forward Application to YGK).                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "In Review (YGK)".                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member has successfully logged in (with YGK-level permissions).                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application's academic eligibility status is updated to "Eligible (Academic)" or "Not Eligible (Academic)".                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  If "Eligible (Academic)", the application is now ready for the next step, UC-4.2: Validate Department-Specific Conditions.                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  If "Not Eligible (Academic)", the application is flagged for rejection, and subsequent steps (like UC-4.2, UC-4.5) may be skipped or disabled.                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application routed to YGK.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The YGK Member logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The YGK dashboard displays a queue of applications for their department with the status "In Review (YGK)".                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member selects an application from the queue and opens it.                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the "Academic Evaluation" screen. This screen shows:                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   The student's submitted form data (from UC-1.1) and all documents (from UC-1.2).                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   The language decision from YDYO (UC-3.1), e.g., "Language Approved".                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 5.  The system automatically displays the results of pre-screening rules (which were validated during UC-1.1):                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   "Minimum GPA (2.50) Met: YES"                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     -   "Valid Semester (3rd/5th) Met: YES"                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 6.  The YGK Member manually reviews the auto-populated data (GPA, YKS score) against the uploaded documents (Transcript, YKS Result) to confirm the pre-screening checks are correct.                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 7.  The YGK Member confirms that all general academic requirements are met.                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 8.  The Officer selects the "Eligible" (Akademik Olarak Uygun) option.                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 9.  The Officer clicks "Save and Continue" (Kaydet ve Devam Et).                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 10. The system saves the "Eligible (Academic)" status (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 11. The system automatically moves the application to the next review step, UC-4.2.                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 12. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-4.1.AC.1.STEP.6 (Decision: Not Eligible):                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the YGK Member identifies a critical academic issue (e.g., the pre-screened GPA was correct, but the transcript shows the student is in their 2nd semester, not 3rd).                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     2.  The Officer selects the "Not Eligible" (Akademik Olarak Uygun Değil) option.                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-4.7: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB, forcing the Officer to enter a mandatory "Justification" (Gerekçe) note (e.g., "Minimum 2.50 GPA sağlanmadı.").                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     4.  The Officer clicks "Save and Flag for Rejection" (after completing the UC-4.7 steps).                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     5.  The system saves the "Not Eligible (Academic)" status (Postcondition 1, 3).                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | -   UC-4.1.AC.2.STEP.4 (Application Fails Language Review):                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     1.  At step 4, the YGK Member sees the YDYO decision is "Language Failed" (from UC-3.2).                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     2.  The Officer selects "Not Eligible" (Akademik Olarak Uygun Değil).                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-4.7: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB (as in AC.1), forcing the Officer to add a note (e.g., "YDYO Red").                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     4.  The Officer saves the decision.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     5.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-4.7: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB (This is conditionally included in AC.1 and AC.2 as a mandatory justification for rejection).                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must clearly display the auto-checked pre-screening results (GPA, Semester) to the YGK member, as specified in the taslak (Main Flow, Step 3).                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must display the YDYO language decision (UC-3.1) prominently on this screen, as this is a critical prerequisite for academic review.                                                                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The Dean's Office has successfully routed the application to the correct department's YGK (via UC-5.1).                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The YGK member has the authority to make this initial eligibility decision.                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Review Academic Eligibility (UC-4.1)

-   Only authorized YGK Members may access and evaluate applications assigned to their department.

-   YGK Members must see all required academic information clearly: transcript data, uploaded documents, pre-screening results, and the language decision from YDYO.

-   The member must be able to mark the application as Eligible or Not Eligible in a single, consistent action.

-   Selecting Not Eligible must always require entering a justification.

-   The system must prevent submitting an eligibility decision without completing required fields (e.g., missing justification).

-   The submitted academic decision must immediately update the application’s status and determine whether the next steps (e.g., UC-4.2) are available.

-   Applications routed to a specific department must be visible only to YGK members of that department.

-   The academic rules used for pre-screening (e.g., minimum GPA) must come from the central configurable rule set to ensure consistency.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.2                                                         
  Use Case Name:   Validate Department-Specific Conditions                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                   Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    16.11.2025                                Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to verify if an academically eligible applicant also meets the mandatory, department-specific conditions (e.g., minimum grades in specific courses, portfolio submission). |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The application has successfully passed the initial academic eligibility check (Postcondition of UC-4.1: Review Academic Eligibility).                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "Eligible (Academic)".                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member is logged in and is on the application's review screen.                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application's department-specific status is updated to "Dept. Conditions Met" or "Dept. Conditions Not Met".                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  If "Dept. Conditions Met", the application is now ready for the next step, UC-4.3: View Auto-Calculated Transfer Score.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  If "Dept. Conditions Not Met", the application is flagged for rejection, and subsequent steps (like UC-4.3, UC-4.5) are skipped.                                                              |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application that passes UC-4.1 for a department that has specific conditions.                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is triggered immediately after the YGK member completes UC-4.1 (Normal Flow, Step 11).                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the "Department-Specific Conditions" (Bölüm Özel Koşulları) review screen.                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The system automatically identifies the student's target department (e.g., "Mimarlık") and prominently displays the specific rules for that department (as configured in UC-7.4).             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     -   Example (Mimarlık): "1. Son Stüdyo Dersi Notu = AA. 2. Portfolyo Yüklü."                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     -   Example (İnşaat): "1. Fizik Dersi Notu >= BB. 2. Matematik Dersi Notu >= BB."                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Member reviews the student's uploaded documents (Transcript and Portfolio, as submitted in UC-1.2) against these specific rules.                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 5.  The YGK Member determines that the student meets all listed conditions (e.g., Transcript shows "AA" in the studio course and the Portfolio is acceptable).                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 6.  The Officer selects the "Meets Requirements" (Koşulları Sağlıyor) option.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 7.  The Officer clicks "Save and Continue" (Kaydet ve Devam Et).                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 8.  The system saves the "Dept. Conditions Met" status (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 9.  The system automatically moves the application to the next review step, UC-4.3.                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-4.2.AC.1.STEP.5 (Decision: Conditions Not Met):                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the YGK Member determines the student does not meet the conditions (e.g., İnşaat applicant has a "BC" in Physics).                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     2.  The Officer selects the "Does Not Meet Requirements" (Koşulları Sağlamıyor) option.                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-4.7: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB, forcing the Officer to enter a mandatory "Justification" (Gerekçe) note (e.g., "Fizik notu BB'den düşük.").           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     4.  The Officer clicks "Save and Flag for Rejection" (after completing the UC-4.7 steps).                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     5.  The system saves the "Dept. Conditions Not Met" status (Postcondition 1, 3).                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | -   UC-4.2.AC.2 (Department Has No Specific Conditions):                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, the system identifies the target department (e.g., "Makine Mühendisliği") has no special conditions configured in the system.                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     2.  The system automatically marks the application status as "Dept. Conditions Met (N/A)".                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     3.  The system bypasses this entire use case (no YGK action needed) and immediately initiates UC-4.3: View Auto-Calculated Transfer Score.                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |     4.  The use case terminates (bypassed).                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-4.2.EX.1 (Required Document (Portfolio) Fails to Load):                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 1.  At step 4, the YGK Member (reviewing a "Mimarlık" application) clicks to open the Portfolio document.                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  The document (from UC-1.3) is corrupt or fails to load.                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  The system displays an error: "Portfolyo belgesi açılamadı. (Hata Kodu: 421-DOC)".                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Officer cannot verify the condition. They must select "Does Not Meet Requirements" (triggering AC.1) with a note explaining the file error.                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-4.7: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB (This is conditionally included in AC.1 as a mandatory justification for rejection).                                                                |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The specific conditions for each department must be clearly displayed to the YGK member (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 2).                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must provide easy access to the specific documents needed to verify these conditions (e.g., Transcript, Portfolio).                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: This check must be enforced for the specific departments (Mimarlık, İnşaat, End. Tasarım).                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The business rules for each department's special conditions are configured in the system by the System Admin (in UC-7.4).                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          | 2.  If a department has no special rules, this step is automatically skipped (AC.2).                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is the second sequential step of YGK review. It is a separate screen/task from the general review in UC-4.1.                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Validate Department-Specific Conditions (UC-4.2)

-   Only authorized YGK Members may access and validate department-specific conditions.

-   The system must allow marking the conditions as Meet or Not Meet in one consistent action.

-   Selecting Not Meet must always require providing a justification.

-   Departments with no special rules must be automatically bypassed, and the application must continue to the next step.

-   The system must prevent submitting a decision without completing required fields (e.g., missing justification).

-   The final decision must immediately update the application’s status and determine whether later steps (e.g., UC-4.3) are available.

-   YGK Members must only see rules and documents belonging to their own department.

-   All decisions must be logged with YGK Member ID, Application ID, timestamp, decision, and justification (if provided).

-   Department rules and required documents must come from a central configurable rule set to ensure consistency.

    1.  Use case 3 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.3                                                     
  Use Case Name:   View Auto-Calculated Transfer Score                        
  Created By:      Group 1                               Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                            Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to view the system-calculated transfer score for an applicant. This score is automatically generated based on the verified YKS and GPA data.                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The application has successfully passed both general academic eligibility (UC-4.1) and department-specific conditions (UC-4.2 or UC-4.2.AC.2).                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "Dept. Conditions Met" (or "Dept. Conditions Met (N/A)").                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The YKS and GPA data were verified by the YGK member (during UC-4.1).                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Member is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The YGK member has viewed and acknowledged the transfer score.                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The application is now ready for the ranking step (UC-4.4: Rank All Applicants).                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application that reaches this stage.                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is triggered immediately after the YGK member completes UC-4.2.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the "Score Review" (Puan Görüntüleme) screen.                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The system prominently displays the finalized, auto-calculated Transfer Score.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
