|                          | 4.  The system also displays the components of the score and the formula used, as specified in the taslak:                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Formula: Score = (Verified YKS / 500 * 0.90) + (Verified GPA * 0.10)                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Verified YKS: [Student's YKS score, e.g., 450.00]                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Verified GPA: [Student's GPA, e.g., 3.80]                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Calculation: ( (450.00 / 500) * 0.90 ) + ( 3.80 * 0.10 ) = 1.19                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 5.  The YGK Member reviews the score and its components (and may perform a manual calculation check, as per the taslak).                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 6.  The YGK Member clicks "Confirm Score and Continue to Ranking" (Puanı Onayla ve Sıralamaya Geç).                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 7.  The system saves the "Score Verified" status.                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 8.  The use case concludes, enabling UC-4.4.                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-4.3.AC.1.STEP.5 (YGK Member Spots Data Error):                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 1.  At step 5, the YGK Member reviews the components (YKS/GPA) and realizes the data they verified in UC-4.1 was incorrect (e.g., they misread the transcript).                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The YGK Member clicks the "Go Back / Correct Data" (Geri Dön / Veri Düzelt) button.                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The system returns the YGK Member to the UC-4.1 (Review Academic Eligibility) screen, invalidating the previous "Eligible" status.                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  This use case terminates, and the review process must restart from UC-4.1.                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-4.3.EX.1 (Score Calculation Fails):                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the system attempts to calculate the score, but the verified YKS or GPA data is missing or null.                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "Puan hesaplanamadı. YKS veya GPA verisi eksik. Lütfen başvuruyu ÖİDB'ye iade edin. (Hata Kodu: 431-CALC)".                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates. (This implies a separate action is needed to return the application to ÖİDB, likely via UC-4.7).                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a "view" and "confirm" use case based on data from previous steps.)                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The calculation formula (as specified in the taslak) and the component values (YKS, GPA) must be displayed clearly to the YGK member to ensure transparency and trust in the automated score. |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The score must be calculated automatically based on the data verified in UC-4.1.                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The YKS and GPA data are clean, verified, and numerical at this stage.                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The YKS "500" denominator is a fixed, standard value (as per the taslak formula).                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The GPA is the 4.0 scale value (e.g., 3.80), as per the taslak formula.                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is primarily a confirmation step. The YGK member is not calculating the score, but viewing the system's calculation before proceeding to the ranking stage (UC-4.4).                      |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: View Auto-Calculated Transfer Score (UC-4.3)

-   Only authorized YGK Members may view the calculated transfer score for applications in their department.

-   The system must clearly show the calculated score along with all component values (e.g., verified YKS score, verified GPA).

-   The member must be able to confirm the score or go back to correct earlier data.

-   Confirming the score must update the application’s status to Score Verified and allow progression to the ranking step.

-   The system must prevent moving forward if the score cannot be calculated or if required data is missing.

-   Using Go Back / Correct Data must invalidate any previously verified score and force re-evaluation after the data is corrected.

-   All score formulas and weight parameters must come from a configurable rule set rather than being hard-coded.

-   All confirmations and corrections must be logged with YGK Member ID, Application ID, timestamp, and the calculated score.

    1.  Use case 4 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- --------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.4                                     
  Use Case Name:   Rank All Applicants                        
  Created By:      Group 1               Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025            Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to generate the final "Asil" (Admitted) and "Yedek" (Waitlisted) lists by ranking all eligible applicants based on their auto-calculated scores and entering the department's quotas.                             |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  All applications for the department have been processed through UC-4.1, UC-4.2, and UC-4.3.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  There is a pool of "Score Verified" applicants ready for ranking.                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  All eligible applicants in the pool are assigned a final ranking status: "Asil", "Yedek", or "Red (Kontenjan Dışı)" (Rejected - Out of Quota).                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  The ranked Asil/Yedek lists are saved and locked, pending review.                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  This action (and its postconditions) enables UC-4.5: Generate Digital Course Equivalence for all applicants marked as "Asil".                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per department per application period.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  After the YGK Member confirms the score for the last eligible applicant (completing the final UC-4.3), the system enables the "Rank All Applicants" (Tüm Başvuruları Sırala) screen/button.                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  The YGK Member navigates to the "Ranking" (Sıralama) screen for their department.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a list of all fully eligible (passed UC-4.1, UC-4.2, UC-4.3) applicants, automatically sorted in descending order by their Transfer Score.                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 4.  The system displays input fields for "Asil Kontenjan Sayısı" (Admitted Quota) and "Yedek Kontenjan Sayısı" (Waitlist Quota).                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 5.  The YGK Member enters the official quotas for their department (e.g., Asil: 5, Yedek: 10), as specified in the taslak.                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 6.  The YGK Member clicks the "Generate Lists" (Listeleri Oluştur) button.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 7.  The system applies the quotas to the sorted list:                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     -   Ranks 1-5 are assigned status: "Asil"                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     -   Ranks 6-15 are assigned status: "Yedek"                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     -   All remaining applicants (Rank 16+) are assigned status: "Red (Kontenjan Dışı)"                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 8.  The system displays these three lists (Asil, Yedek, Red) clearly on the screen for final review by the YGK Member.                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 9.  The YGK Member reviews the generated lists.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 10. The YGK Member clicks "Confirm and Save Ranking" (Sıralamayı Onayla ve Kaydet).                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 11. The system saves these new statuses for all applicants (Postcondition 1, 2).                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 12. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-4.4.AC.1.STEP.7 (Tie-Breaking Required):                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the system detects a tie in Transfer Score exactly at a quota boundary (e.g., two students tied for the 5th "Asil" spot).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     2.  The system flags the tied applicants and displays a message: "Kontenjan sınırında (5. sıra) puan eşitliği (1.19) tespit edildi. Lütfen kurallara göre (örn: YKS puanı, yaş) bu adayların sıralamasını manuel olarak belirleyin." |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     3.  The system allows the YGK Member to manually set the rank (e.g., "5" and "6") for the tied students.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     4.  The use case continues from Step 8.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | -   UC-4.4.AC.2.STEP.5 (YGK Enters Zero Quota):                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the department is not accepting any students this period.                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     2.  The YGK Member enters "Asil: 0" and "Yedek: 0".                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     3.  At step 7, the system assigns all eligible applicants the status "Red (Kontenjan Dışı)".                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |     4.  The use case continues from Step 8.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-4.4.EX.1 (No Eligible Applicants):                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the system finds that zero (0) applicants have successfully passed UC-4.1 and UC-4.2.                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  The system displays a message: "Sıralanacak uygun başvuru bulunmamaktadır."                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The sorting (Step 3) must be strictly based on the Transfer Score calculated in UC-4.3.                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must provide a mechanism for tie-breaking (AC.1). The institutional policy for tie-breaking must be clearly defined.                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The YGK Member (not the System Admin) is responsible for entering the quotas for their own department during the ranking phase (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 3).                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          | 2.  All applicants who were not eligible (failed UC-4.1 or UC-4.2) are not included in this ranking list at all                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Rank All Applicants (UC-4.4)

-   The system must display all eligible applicants for that department, automatically sorted by their verified Transfer Score.

-   The YGK Member must be able to enter quotas (Asil / Yedek) and generate the ranking preview in one step.

-   The preview must clearly separate the three groups: Asil, Yedek, and Red (Konetnjan dışı).

-   If there is a tie at the quota boundary, the system must alert the user and allow manual tie-breaking.

-   The member must be able to confirm the final ranking, and this action must update each applicant’s status accordingly.

-   The system must prevent ranking if there are no eligible applicants.

-   Errors during loading or saving must show a clear message and must not create partial or inconsistent ranking results.

-   YGK Members must only rank applications belonging to their own department.

-   Final ranking decisions must be logged with YGK Member ID, quotas used, timestamp, and affected applicants.

-   Only applicants who successfully passed earlier steps (UC-4.1, UC-4.2, UC-4.3) may appear in the ranking list.

-   The ranking statuses (Asil / Yedek / Red) must become locked after confirmation and cannot be changed without higher-level approval.

    1.  Use case 5 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.5                                                               
  Use Case Name:   Generate Digital Course Equivalence (İntibak)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                         Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                                      Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to create a digital course equivalence (İntibak) table for an a student, mapping their previous courses to the target department's curriculum.                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The YGK Member has successfully generated the list (Postcondition of UC-4.4: Rank All Applicants).                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The YGK Member has selected an applicant to prepare their intibak.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A digital intibak table (mapping courses and specifying exemptions) is created and saved.                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The table is associated with the student's Application ID.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The application is now ready for the final approval step (UC-4.6: Approve or Reject Application).                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every approved student.                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  After confirming the ranking (UC-4.4), the system displays the student list.                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The YGK Member clicks the "Prepare Intibak" (İntibak Hazırla) button next to a student's name.                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The system displays the "Digital Intibak" (Dijital İntibak) interface.                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  This interface shows two columns:                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Column A (Previous Courses): The system automatically pulls (otomatik çeker) the student's courses, grades, and ECTS from their uploaded Transcript and Course Contents documents (from UC-1.3).                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Column B (Target Curriculum): The system displays the target department's curriculum (e.g., CENG 111, CENG 113...).                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 5.  For each course in Column A, the system provides a "Find Match" (Karşılık Bul) button.                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 6.  The YGK Member clicks "Find Match" for a course (e.g., "COMP 101 - Intro to Programming").                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 7.  The system suggests possible matches from Column B based on smart suggestions (akıllı eşleştirme) using course name, code, and ECTS similarity (e.g., "Öneri: CENG 113").                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 8.  The YGK Member reviews the suggestion: a. If the suggestion is correct, the Officer clicks "Approve Match" (Öneriyi Onayla). b. If the suggestion is incorrect, the Officer manually selects the correct course from the curriculum list in Column B. |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 9.  The system links the two courses (e.g., COMP 101 -> CENG 113) and marks the CENG 101 course as "Muaf" (Exempted) in Column B.                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 10. The YGK Member repeats steps 6-9 for all relevant courses from the student's previous institution.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 11. After all equivalences are mapped, the YGK Member reviews the complete intibak table.                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 12. The YGK Member clicks the "Save Intibak Table" (İntibak Tablosunu Kaydet) button.                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 13. The system saves the digital table and links it to the student's Application ID (Postconditions 1, 2).                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 14. The system marks the student's "Intibak Status" as "Completed".                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 15. The use case concludes, enabling UC-4.6.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-4.5.AC.1.STEP.8 (Course Has No Equivalence):                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 8, the YGK Member determines that a course from Column A (e.g., "History of Art") has no equivalent in the target curriculum.                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The Officer selects "No Match / Muaf Değil" (Karşılığı Yok / Muaf Değil) for that course.                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  The system marks the course as "Not Exempted". The use case continues.                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | -   UC-4.5.AC.2.STEP.8 (Multiple Courses Map to One Course):                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 8, the YGK Member determines that two courses (e.g., "Calc 1" and "Calc Lab") together map to one target course (e.g., "MATH 121").                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The system interface allows the Officer to select both "Calc 1" and "Calc Lab" from Column A and map them to "MATH 121" in Column B.                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  The use case continues.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | -   UC-4.5.AC.3.STEP.7 (Smart Suggestion Fails):                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the system's smart suggestion feature finds no obvious matches.                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The system displays "No suggestions found."                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  The YGK Member must perform manual matching (Step 8.b). The use case continues.                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must provide an "akıllı eşleştirme" (smart suggestion) feature to speed up the process (as per the taslak).                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must be able to automatically read (e.g., OCR or parse PDF) the student's courses from their uploaded transcript (as per the taslak, "otomatik çeker").                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The interface must be a flexible, two-column (side-by-side) view to allow easy mapping.                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  SR-4: The system must support many-to-one and one-to-many mappings (e.g., AC.2).                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The student's uploaded Transcript and Course Contents documents (from UC-1.2) are readable by the system (e.g., not a scanned-in-sideways image).                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The target department's curriculum (Column B) is already defined in the system (configured by UC-7.4).                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Generate Digital Course Equivalence (Intibak) (UC-4.5)

-   Only authorized YGK Members may prepare the digital course equivalence table for applicants in their department.

-   The system must auto-extract previous courses from the transcript when possible; if extraction fails, the member must be able to add courses manually.

-   The member must be able to match previous courses to target curriculum courses using either smart suggestions or manual selection.

-   Smart suggestions must be optional; failure to find a suggestion must not block manual mapping.

-   The interface must support many-to-one and one-to-many mappings where required.

-   The member must be able to mark courses with no equivalent as No Match / Muaf değil.

-   The final intibak table must be saved as a complete, consistent record without partial entries.

-   Only students in the Asil list may have an intibak table generated.

-   The final mapping (each target course marked as Exempted / Not Exempted) must update the application’s status and allow progression to later steps.

-   All intibak actions must be logged with YGK Member ID, Application ID, timestamp, and a summary of mappings.

    1.  Use case 6 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.6                                               
  Use Case Name:   Approve or Reject Application                        
  Created By:      Group 1                         Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                      Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to give the final academic approval or rejection for an application after all evaluation steps (eligibility, ranking, intibak) are complete, and digitally sign the decision. |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  All prior YGK evaluation steps for the applicant are complete:                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   UC-4.4 (Ranking) is complete (determining Asil/Yedek/Red).                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   For "Asil" applicants, UC-4.5 (Intibak) is also complete.                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The application is in a status like "Ready for Final YGK Decision".                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application's final status is updated to "YGK Approved" or "YGK Rejected".                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The decision is digitally signed and logged with a timestamp.                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The application is now ready to be included in the final package for the Dean's Office (enabling UC-4.8: Export Final Evaluation Package).                                                       |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application evaluated by the YGK.                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The YGK Member navigates to the "Ready for Final Decision" queue on their dashboard.                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The Member selects an "Asil" applicant whose intibak is marked "Completed".                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a "Final Decision" (Nihai Karar) summary screen, showing all components:                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   General Eligibility (UC-4.1): "Eligible (Academic)"                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   Dept. Conditions (UC-4.2): "Dept. Conditions Met"                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   Language Status (UC-3.1): "Language Approved"                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   Ranking (UC-4.4): "Asil (Rank: 1)"                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   Intibak Status (UC-4.5): "Completed"                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Member reviews this summary and confirms all steps are correct.                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 5.  The YGK Member clicks the "Approve" (Onayla) button.                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 6.  The system prompts for digital signature/confirmation (e.g., "Kararı onayla: [YGK Üyesi Adı]").                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 7.  The YGK Member confirms the action.                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
