|                          | 8.  The system saves the final status as "YGK Approved" and logs the digital signature (Postconditions 1, 2).                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes, and the application is ready for packaging (UC-4.8).                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-4.6.AC.1.STEP.2 (Finalize "Yedek" Applicant):                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, the Member selects a "Yedek" (Waitlisted) applicant (from UC-4.4).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the summary. The "Intibak Status" is "N/A (Yedek)".                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The YGK Member clicks the "Approve (as Yedek)" (Yedek Olarak Onayla) button.                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The use case proceeds from Step 6.                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     5.  The final status is saved as "YGK Approved (Yedek)".                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-4.6.AC.2.STEP.2 (Finalize "Rejected" Applicant):                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, the Member selects an applicant who was already flagged for rejection (e.g., "Not Eligible" in UC-4.1 or "Red (Kontenjan Dışı)" in UC-4.4).                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the summary, highlighting the rejection reason.                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The YGK Member clicks the "Reject" (Reddet) button to formally confirm the rejection.                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The system retrieves the mandatory justification note already entered (via UC-4.7).                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     5.  The use case proceeds from Step 6.                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     6.  The final status is saved as "YGK Rejected".                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-4.6.AC.3.STEP.5 (Add Optional Comment):                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 5 (Normal Flow), before clicking "Approve", the YGK Member decides to add an optional note.                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The Member clicks a link/button to include UC-4.7: Add Comments (e.g., "Öğrencinin CENG 101 dersi için muafiyeti şartlıdır.").                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  After saving the comment, the use case returns to Step 5.                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-4.6.EX.1 (Digital Signature Fails):                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the Member confirms, but the system's digital signature service fails.                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Karar imzalanamadı. Lütfen tekrar deneyin. (Hata Kodu: 461-SIGN)".                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates, and the decision is not saved.                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-4.6.EX.2 (Incomplete Prerequisite):                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the system detects that a required step is missing (e.g., the applicant is "Asil" but UC-4.5 (Intibak) is not complete).                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The "Approve" button is disabled.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The system displays a message: "Nihai karar verilemez. Lütfen önce intibak tablosunu tamamlayın."                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | Adding Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must require a digital signature or a final, logged confirmation (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 4) for all final decisions.                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must present a complete summary (as in Normal Flow, Step 3) so the YGK member can review all factors at once before finalizing.                                                 |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  This use case is the final step for a YGK member for an individual application.                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  "Approve" is a generic term. The system approves the status ("Asil", "Yedek") that was determined in UC-4.4.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The "Reject" action here is mostly a formal confirmation of a rejection decision (like "Not Eligible" or "Kontenjan Dışı") that was already flagged in a previous step.                          |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Approve or Reject Application (UC-4.6)

-   Only authorized YGK Members may access the “Ready for Final Decision” queue for their department.

-   When a member selects an applicant, the system must show a clear summary of all prerequisite statuses (UC-4.1, UC-4.2, UC-4.3, UC-4.4, UC-4.5) in a read-only view.

-   The system must not allow “Approve” for an Asil applicant unless the intibak process (UC-4.5) is fully completed.

-   Final decisions must require a confirmation step or digital signature from the YGK Member.

-   If the applicant had a justification note entered earlier (UC-4.7), the system must display this note during rejection.

-   If conditions for approval are not met, the system must show a clear and actionable message explaining what is missing.

-   A failed action (e.g., signature failure or missing prerequisite) must not change the application status or move it forward.

-   The final decision (Approved / Approved as Yedek / Rejected) must be saved as a complete and consistent record. Partial or incomplete data must never be stored.

-   Optional comments added by the YGK Member (e.g., conditional exemptions) must be saved together with the final decision.

-   For rejected applicants, the system must correctly attach the previously entered justification to the final rejection status.

-   Every final decision must be logged with YGK Member ID, Application ID, Timestamp, Final Status, and confirmation record.

    1.  Use case 7 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- --------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.7                                                       
  Use Case Name:   Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                 Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                              Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to add an official, visible note (justification, comment, or warning) to an application. This note becomes part of the permanent record visible to ÖİDB and the Dean's Office. |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The YGK Member is currently reviewing an application in a parent use case (e.g., UC-4.1, UC-4.2, or UC-4.6).                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The "Add Note" action has been triggered (either optionally by the user or mandatorily by the system for a rejection decision).                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The note (text) is saved and logged with the YGK Member's name and a timestamp.                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The note is associated with the Application ID.                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system makes the note visible to the ÖİDB and Dean's Office dashboards.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The system returns control to the parent use case (e.g., UC-4.1.AC.1, step 4).                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (as it is mandatory for rejections)                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (used in all rejections and optionally in other decisions).                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is "included" by a parent use case (e.g., UC-4.2.AC.1) because a negative decision (e.g., "Does Not Meet Requirements") was selected.                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the "Add Note" (Not Ekle / Gerekçe) interface (e.g., a modal text box).                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a prompt: "Red kararı için gerekçe girilmesi zorunludur." (A justification is mandatory for this decision).                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Member types the justification (gerekçe, özel durum) into the text field (e.g., "Bölüm özel koşulu olan Fizik BB notu sağlanmadı.").                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 5.  The YGK Member clicks the "Save Note" (Notu Kaydet) button.                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 6.  The system validates that the text field is not empty.                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 7.  The system saves the note to the database, linking it to the application, user, and timestamp (Postconditions 1, 2, 3).                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 8.  The system closes the "Add Note" interface and returns control to the parent use case (Postcondition 4). The use case concludes.                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-4.7.AC.1 (Optional Note):                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     1.  This use case is "included" by a parent use case (e.g., UC-4.6.AC.3) because the YGK Member optionally clicked the "Add Note" button.                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the "Add Note" interface (Step 2).                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     3.  The prompt (Step 3) is "İsteğe bağlı not:" (Optional Note:).                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     4.  The use case proceeds from Step 4 (the validation in Step 6 is skipped).                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | -   UC-4.7.AC.2.STEP.6 (Empty Mandatory Note):                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     1.  At step 6 (Normal Flow), the system validates the note and finds the text field is empty.                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an inline error: "Lütfen kararınız için bir gerekçe girin."                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a utility use case that is included by others).                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The visibility of the note must be restricted (as per the taslak: Dekanlık + ÖİDB). The student should not see these internal notes.                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: Notes must be logged (timestamped) and immutable (cannot be edited after saving) to maintain a clear audit trail.                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  This use case cannot be initiated by itself; it is always called from within another YGK use case.                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The parent use case (e.g., UC-4.1) is responsible for handling the application after this note is successfully saved.                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This utility use case simplifies all other YGK use cases, as they don't need to define "how" a comment is added; they can just "include UC-4.7".                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB (UC-4.7)

-   The note interface must open when a parent action (e.g., rejection) requires or allows adding a comment.

-   Notes must always be linked to a specific application and cannot exist independently.

-   Mandatory notes (e.g., for rejection) must require the user to enter text before saving.

-   Optional notes must be clearly indicated as optional.

-   Saved notes must become read-only and cannot be edited or deleted.

-   Only authorized internal staff (YGK, ÖİDB, Dean’s Office) may view these notes; students must not have access.

-   Saving a note must complete successfully before the parent action (e.g., final rejection) can proceed.

-   If saving fails, no status change or final decision from the parent use case should be applied.

-   Each note must be stored together with the author’s identity and timestamp.

-   All note creation actions must be logged with Application ID, User ID, Timestamp, and the note text.

    1.  Use case 8 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- --------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.8                                                 
  Use Case Name:   Export Final Evaluation Package                        
  Created By:      Group 1                           Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                        Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member (e.g., the commission chair) to bundle all finalized application decisions (Asil/Yedek/Red lists, intibak tables, and justifications) into a single digital package and formally submit it to the Dean's Office. |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  All applications assigned to the YGK's department have a final, signed-off status (i.e., UC-4.6 has been completed for every applicant in the queue).                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The YGK Member (with authority to submit, e.g., commission chair) is logged in.                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A single, immutable "Evaluation Package" (containing all decision data) is generated, digitally signed, and logged with a timestamp.                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The package is routed to the Dean's Office work queue.                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The status of all applications within the package is updated (e.g., "Pending Dean's Office Review").                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  This action (and its postconditions) triggers UC-5.2: Receive Evaluation Package from YGK.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 5.  The YGK's evaluation work for the period is marked as "Completed".                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per department per application period.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The YGK Member logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The YGK dashboard (e.g., UC-4.4 screen) shows that 100% of applications for the department are finalized (Postcondition of UC-4.6).                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The "Export Package to Dean's Office" (Paketi Dekanlığa Gönder) button is now enabled.                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Member clicks this "Export Package" button.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 5.  The system generates and displays a "Final Package Summary" screen for review, showing:                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Asil List: (e.g., 5 applicants)                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Yedek List: (e.g., 10 applicants)                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Rejected List: (e.g., 35 applicants)                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   Intibak Tables Prepared: (e.g., 5)                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 6.  (This matches the taslak: "Sistem tüm belgeleri tek dijital paket halinde oluşturur.")                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 7.  The YGK Member clicks "Confirm and Send to Dean's Office" (Onayla ve Dekanlığa İlet).                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 8.  The system prompts for a final digital signature/confirmation (similar to UC-4.6).                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 9.  The YGK Member confirms.                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 10. the package to the The system generates the final immutable package, logs the action, and routes Dean's Office queue (Postconditions 1, 2).                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 11. The system updates the status of all applications in the package (e.g., 50 applications) to "Pending Dean's Office Review" (Postcondition 3).                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 12. The YGK dashboard updates to show "Package Sent. Evaluation Complete."                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 13. The use case concludes, triggering UC-5.2.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-4.8.AC.1.STEP.3 (Not All Applications are Finalized):                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the "Export Package to Dean's Office" button is disabled.                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The system displays a message: "Paket gönderilemez. Henüz karara bağlanmamış (x) adet başvuru bulunmaktadır. Lütfen UC-4.6 adımını tamamlayın."                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates, requiring the YGK member to go back and complete UC-4.6 for the remaining applications.                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-4.8.EX.1 (Package Generation Fails):                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     1.  At step 10, the YGK Member confirms, but the system fails to bundle the decision data (e.g., 50 applications, 5 intibaks, and all justifications) into a single package.                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Nihai paket oluşturulamadı. (Hata Kodu: 481-PKG)".                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | -   UC-4.8.EX.2 (Dean's Office Queue Fails):                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     1.  At step 10, the system creates the package but fails to route it to the Dean's Office work queue.                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Paket oluşturuldu ancak Dekanlık kuyruğuna iletilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 482-QUEUE)".                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates (requires System Admin UC-7.x intervention).                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must validate that every single application for that department is finalized (UC-4.6) before enabling the "Export Package" button (AC.1).                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The generated package must be immutable (read-only) once submitted to the Dean's Office to ensure data integrity and a clear audit trail.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: This action must require a final digital signature/confirmation from an authorized YGK member.                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | This use case is performed once at the very end of the YGK evaluation period for the entire department, not per-student.                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Export Final Evaluation Package (UC-4.8)

-   System must verify that all applications are finalized before enabling the “Export Package” button.

-   If any application is incomplete, the button stays disabled with a clear explanation.

-   Clicking “Export Package” must show a simple summary (counts of Asil / Yedek / Red + intibak completion).

-   After confirmation, the system must bundle all data, attach the department’s digital signature, and send the package to the Dean’s Office.

-   Package creation must be atomic (no partial package, no partial status updates).

-   If package creation fails, show a clear standardized error (481-PKG).

-   If routing to Dean’s Office fails, the package must be preserved for admin intervention (482-QUEUE).

-   Only authorized YGK Chair can export the package.

-   Once exported, the package becomes read-only / immutable.

-   All included applications must automatically switch to “Pending Dean’s Office Review”.

-   Export action must be fully logged (Chair ID, timestamp, department, package ID).

-   Package must be included in backups because it is a final decision artifact.

    1.  Use case 9 for user 4

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- --------------------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-4.9                                                                   
  Use Case Name:   Review Clarification Request (from Dean's Office)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                             Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                                          Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | YGK Member (Departmental Transfer Commission)                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the YGK member to review a clarification request from the Dean's Office (regarding a submitted package), make the necessary corrections (e.g., fix a missing intibak), and re-submit the package. |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Dean's Office has returned the evaluation package for correction (Postcondition of UC-5.5: Request Clarification from YGK).                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is "Waiting for Clarification (from YGK)".                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member (e.g., Chair) has successfully logged in.                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The requested corrections (e.g., a modified intibak, a new comment) are saved.                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The package is re-submitted to the Dean's Office work queue.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The package status is updated back to "Pending Dean's Office Review".                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  This action (and its postconditions) triggers UC-5.2: Receive Evaluation Package from YGK (again).                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (occurs only if YGK evaluation packages are returned by the Dean's Office).                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The YGK Member (e.g., Chair) logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The YGK dashboard displays a high-priority task: "Package Returned by Dean's Office for Clarification".                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member opens the returned package.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The system prominently displays the "Clarification Request" note (açıklama talebi mesajı) entered by the Dean's Office Staff (from UC-5.5).                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Example: "1. Asil adayın (Melih Yıldız) intibak tablosu pakete eklenmemiş. Lütfen ekleyip tekrar gönderin."                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 5.  The system "unlocks" the relevant parts of the application package that require correction (e.g., the "Intibak" button for Melih Yıldız, which re-initiates UC-4.5 for that student).                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 6.  The YGK Member performs the required action (e.g., navigates to UC-4.5 for Melih Yıldız and completes/saves the intibak table).                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 7.  After making the correction, the YGK Member navigates back to the main package screen.                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 8.  The YGK Member (optionally) includes UC-4.7: Add Comments to add a response note to the Dean's Office (e.g., "İntibak tablosu eklendi.").                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 9.  The YGK Member clicks the "Re-submit Package to Dean's Office" (Paketi Dekanlığa Yeniden Gönder) button.                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 10. The system re-validates the package integrity (as in UC-5.2, Step 5) to ensure the clarification request was addressed.                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 11. The system updates the package status to "Pending Dean's Office Review" and routes it back to the Dean's Office queue (Postconditions 2, 3).                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 12. The use case concludes, triggering UC-5.2.                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-4.9.AC.1.STEP.4 (YGK Disagrees with Clarification Request):                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 1.  At step 4, the YGK Member reviews the Dean's note.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The YGK Member determines no correction is needed (e.g., "Dekanlık notu yanlış anlamış, intibak zaten mevcut.").                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The YGK Member skips step 6 (making corrections).                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The YGK Member mandatorily includes UC-4.7: Add Comments to explain why no correction was made (e.g., "İntibak tablosu zaten paketin 'Ekler' bölümündeydi.").                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 5.  The use case proceeds from Step 9 (Re-submit).                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-4.9.EX.1 (Correction Fails):                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 6, the YGK Member attempts to fix the issue (e.g., re-run UC-4.5), but the system fails (e.g., UC-4.5.EX.2 - Save Fails).                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The correction cannot be made. The YGK Member cannot re-submit the package.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates (requires Admin intervention).                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | -   UC-4.9.EX.2 (Re-submit Queue Fails):                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 11, the system fails to route the corrected package back to the Dean's Office queue.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Paket Dekanlık kuyruğuna yeniden gönderilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 491-QUEUE)".                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
