|                          |     3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | -   UC-4.7: Add Comments for Dean's Office / ÖİDB (Optionally included in Normal Flow, mandatorily in AC.1).                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | -   (This use case utilizes or re-runs other use cases like UC-4.5 or UC-4.6 to make corrections, but doesn't "Include" them in a programmatic way).                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must clearly display the note (from UC-5.5) explaining why the package was returned.                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must unlock the previously finalized package (UC-4.8) to allow the YGK to make the specific corrections requested.                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | Only an authorized YGK member can view and re-submit a returned package.                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case completes the YGK <> Dean's Office review loop.                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Review Clarification Request (from Dean's Office) (UC-4.9)

-   Returned package must clearly show the Dean’s clarification note when opened.

-   System must allow editing only the items flagged by the Dean’s Office; all other data stays read-only.

-   Re-submission must be atomic: if routing fails, package stays in Waiting for Clarification.

-   Only authorized YGK members may modify and re-submit returned packages.

-   A justification note is mandatory if YGK rejects the clarification request.

-   Package must be re-validated before re-submission to prevent inconsistent data.

-   All updates and notes must be logged with timestamp and user ID.

-   Modified components and notes must be backed up after re-submission.

    1.  Use cases for user 5

        1.  Use case 1 for user 5

            1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ---------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.1                                            
  Use Case Name:   Forward Application to YGK                        
  Created By:      Group 1                      Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                   Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ---------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to receive an application package from ÖİDB and formally route it to the correct department's YGK (Departmental Transfer Commission) to begin the academic review.           |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  ÖİDB has forwarded the application to the Dean's Office (Postcondition of UC-2.4).                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The application's status is "In Review (YGK)" (veya "Pending YGK Routing").                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The Dean's Office Staff has successfully logged in (with Dean's Office permissions).                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The application is successfully assigned and added to the specific YGK's work queue (e.g., "Computer Engineering YGK").                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The application status is confirmed as "In Review (YGK)".                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  This action (and its postconditions) is the trigger for UC-4.1: Review Academic Eligibility.                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once for every application routed to the faculty.                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Dean's Office Staff logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The Dean's Office dashboard displays a queue of new applications labeled "Pending YGK Routing" (YGK Yönlendirmesi Bekleyenler) (these are the applications sent via UC-2.4).                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The Staff selects an application from the queue.                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the application summary, clearly showing the "Target Department" (e.g., "Computer Engineering").                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 5.  The Staff verifies that the target department belongs to their faculty.                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 6.  The Staff clicks the "Forward to YGK" (YGK'ya Yönlendir) button.                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 7.  The system confirms the action.                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 8.  The system removes the application from the Dean's "Pending YGK Routing" queue and places it into the "Computer Engineering YGK" work queue (Postcondition 1).                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes, (triggering UC-4.1).                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-5.1.AC.1.STEP.5 (Wrong Faculty - Send Back to ÖİDB):                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 1.  At step 5, the Staff reviews the application and identifies that the target department (e.g., "Mimarlık") does not belong to their faculty (e.g., they are in "Mühendislik Fakültesi").                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The Staff clicks the "Return to ÖİDB" (ÖİDB'ye Geri Gönder) button.                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The system requires the Staff to add a mandatory note (similar to UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments) explaining the reason (e.g., "Yanlış fakülteye yönlendirildi.").                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  The application status is changed to "Returned for Correction (by Dean's Office)".                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 5.  The application is routed back to the ÖİDB queue (UC-2.1) for re-routing.                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 6.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-5.1.EX.1 (YGK Queue Fails):                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 1.  At step 8, the system fails to add the application to the specific YGK work queue.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "Başvuru YGK kuyruğuna eklenemedi. (Hata Kodu: 511-QUEUE)".                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates; the application remains in the Dean's queue.                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | Adding Administrative Comments                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | SR-1: The system must automatically know which YGK queue to send the application to, based on the "Target Department" selected by the student in UC-1.1. The Staff's role is simply to confirm this routing. |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The Dean's Office role in this step is purely administrative (a "router" or "gatekeeper"). They do not perform academic checks here; that is the YGK's responsibility in UC-4.1.                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Forward Application to YGK (UC-5.1)

-   Routing must be atomic: an application cannot leave the Dean’s queue unless it is successfully added to the correct YGK queue.

-   Only authenticated Dean’s Office Staff may access this use case and only for departments in their faculty scope.

-   System must automatically map Target Department to YGK Queue; Staff should never manually search queue IDs.

-   “Return to ÖİDB” must instantly move the application back to the ÖİDB queue with mandatory justification.

-   System must guarantee that each application belongs to exactly one active queue at any moment (no orphan states).

-   All routing actions (Forward or Return) must be logged with staff ID, timestamp, and source/target queue.

-   Standardized error code 511-QUEUE must be used for all queue assignment failures.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 5

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.2                                                     
  Use Case Name:   Receive Evaluation Package from YGK                        
  Created By:      Group 1                               Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                            Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to receive the finalized digital evaluation package (Asil/Yedek lists, intibak tables, and justifications) submitted by the YGK.                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The YGK has finalized and exported their evaluation package (Postcondition of UC-4.8: Export Final Evaluation Package).                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  The application package's status is "Pending Dean's Office Review".                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 3.  The Dean's Office Staff has successfully logged in (with Dean's Office permissions).                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The package's receipt is logged, and its status is updated (e.g., "In Review (Dean's Office)").                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  The package is now ready to be forwarded to the Faculty Board (enabling UC-5.3: Forward Package to Faculty Board).                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per department per application period (after YGK completes its work).                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Dean's Office Staff logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  The Dean's Office dashboard displays a new item in the "Incoming YGK Packages" (Gelen YGK Paketleri) queue.                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 3.  The Staff opens the package.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the package summary (Asil/Yedek/Red lists, intibak tables) and the YGK's digital signature (from UC-4.8).                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 5.  The system automatically verifies the package integrity (e.g., "All Asil students have an intibak table", "All rejections have a justification", "Package is digitally signed by YGK Chair"). (This matches the taslak, Main Flow, Step 4). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 6.  The system displays "Package Integrity: Verified" (Paket Bütünlüğü: Doğrulandı).                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 7.  The Dean's Office Staff performs a high-level review of the lists.                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 8.  The Staff (optionally) clicks UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments to add a note for the Faculty Board.                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes, and the package is ready for the next step, UC-5.3.                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-5.2.AC.1.STEP.5 (Package Integrity Fails / Request Clarification):                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 1.  At step 5, the system's automated integrity check fails (e.g., "Error: Asil student [Name] is missing an intibak table").                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  The system displays "Package Integrity: FAILED" and highlights the error.                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 3.  The Staff initiates UC-5.5: Request Clarification from YGK.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 4.  The package status is set to "Waiting for Clarification (from YGK)".                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 5.  The use case terminates, and the package is routed back to the YGK queue.                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | -   UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments (Optionally included in Step 8).                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | -   UC-5.5: Request Clarification from YGK (Conditionally triggered in AC.1).                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | SR-1: The system must perform an automated integrity check (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 4) to ensure all required components (lists, intibaks, justifications) are present before the package moves to the Faculty Board.                |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The YGK package (from UC-4.8) is immutable (read-only). The Dean's Office cannot change YGK's decisions, only review them and (optionally) add comments (UC-5.4) or return them (UC-5.5).                                                       |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Receive Evaluation Package from YGK (UC-5.2)

-   Automated integrity check must be fully reliable, detecting missing documents, missing intibak tables, or missing signatures before the package can proceed.

-   Package content must be immutable/read-only for Dean’s Office; no edits allowed after delivery from YGK.

-   Access must be restricted to authenticated Dean’s Office Staff only.

-   Package loading and verification must scale to large packages with many attachments.

-   All integrity validation rules must come from a central validation service, shared by YGK and Dean’s Office.

-   Standard error code 521-PKG must be used for all package load/integrity issues.

-   If integrity fails, system must enforce a strict block (cannot continue to UC-5.3) until returned to YGK.

    1.  Use case 3 for user 5

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ---------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.3                                                  
  Use Case Name:   Forward Package to Faculty Board                        
  Created By:      Group 1                            Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                         Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ---------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to perform a final administrative review of the YGK's evaluation package and forward it to the Faculty Board for final approval.     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The YGK evaluation package has been received and verified by the Dean's Office (Postcondition of UC-5.2: Receive Evaluation Package from YGK).                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is "In Review (Dean's Office)".                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The Dean's Office Staff is logged in.                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The package is routed to the Faculty Board work queue.                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is updated to "Pending Faculty Board Review".                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  This action (and its postconditions) triggers the start of UC-6.1: Review Evaluation Package.                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per department per application period.                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Dean's Office Staff logs into the system.                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The Staff selects a package from the "In Review (Dean's Office)" queue (the post-UC-5.2 queue).                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The Staff opens the package and performs a final administrative review of the contents (Asil/Yedek lists, intibak tables, YGK justifications, and any comments). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 4.  The Staff (optionally) clicks to include UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments to add a final note for the Faculty Board.                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 5.  After the review, the Staff clicks the "Forward to Faculty Board" (Fakülte Kuruluna İlet) button.                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 6.  The system displays a confirmation prompt.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 7.  The Staff confirms the action.                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the package status to "Pending Faculty Board Review" (Postcondition 2).                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 9.  The system adds the package to the Faculty Board work queue (Postcondition 1), which enables UC-6.1.                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes. (The Staff can now optionally perform UC-5.7 to notify the board).                                                                       |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-5.3.AC.1.STEP.3 (Request Clarification from YGK):                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, during the administrative review, the Staff finds an error or inconsistency (e.g., a note from YGK mentions an "attached file" that is missing).      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The Staff does not click "Forward to Faculty Board".                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  Instead, the Staff clicks "Request Clarification" (Açıklama İste).                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 4.  The system initiates UC-5.5: Request Clarification from YGK.                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 5.  The use case terminates. The package is routed back to YGK.                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-5.3.EX.1 (Faculty Board Queue Fails):                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 1.  At step 9, the system fails to add the package to the Faculty Board work queue.                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "Paket Fakülte Kurulu kuyruğuna iletilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 531-QUEUE)".                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates. The package status remains "In Review (Dean's Office)".                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | -   UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments (Optionally included in Step 4).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-5.5: Request Clarification from YGK (Conditionally triggered in AC.1)                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must ensure that only packages with a "Verified" integrity check (from UC-5.2) can be forwarded to the Faculty Board.                           |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             |                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Forward Package to Faculty Board (UC-5.3)

-   Routing to the Faculty Board queue must be atomic; the package status cannot change unless the queue update is successful (531-QUEUE for failures).

-   Only authenticated Dean’s Office Staff may initiate forwarding.

-   The interface must clearly separate actions (Forward / Request Clarification) to prevent accidental routing.

-   System must enforce that forwarding is only allowed if the package passed the integrity check in UC-5.2.

-   The queueing system must support simultaneous routing from multiple faculties without conflicts.

    1.  Use case 4 for user 5

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.4                                             
  Use Case Name:   Add Administrative Comments                        
  Created By:      Group 1                       Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                    Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to add an official, visible note (justification, comment, or warning) to an application package. This note becomes part of the permanent record visible to the YGK and Faculty Board. |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Dean's Office Staff is currently reviewing an application or package in a parent use case (e.g., UC-5.1, UC-5.2, or UC-5.3).                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The "Add Note" action has been triggered (either optionally by the user or mandatorily by the system, e.g., for returning an application to ÖİDB).                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The Dean's Office Staff is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The note (text) is saved and logged with the Staff's name and a timestamp.                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The note is associated with the Application Package.                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system makes the note visible to the YGK and Faculty Board (as per the taslak).                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The system returns control to the parent use case (e.g., UC-5.1.AC.1, step 4).                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Used frequently when returning packages or adding clarifications.                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is "included" by a parent use case (e.g., UC-5.3) because the Staff optionally clicked the "Add Note" button.                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the "Add Administrative Note" (İdari Not Ekle) interface (e.g., a modal text box).                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a prompt: "İsteğe bağlı not (YGK ve Fakülte Kurulu görebilir):"                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The Staff types the note (e.g., "Stüdyo dersi notu eksik görünüyor" - as per the taslak).                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 5.  The Staff clicks the "Save Note" (Notu Kaydet) button.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 6.  The system saves the note to the database, linking it to the package, user, and timestamp (Postconditions 1, 2, 3).                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 7.  The system closes the "Add Note" interface and returns control to the parent use case (Postcondition 4). The use case concludes.                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-5.4.AC.1 (Mandatory Note - e.g., Returning to ÖİDB):                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 1.  This use case is "included" by a parent use case (e.g., UC-5.1.AC.1) because a negative decision (e.g., "Return to ÖİDB") was selected.                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The system displays the "Add Administrative Note" interface (Step 2).                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The prompt (Step 3) is "Geri gönderme nedeni girilmesi zorunludur."                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The Staff types the justification (e.g., "Yanlış fakülteye yönlendirildi.").                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 5.  The Staff clicks "Save Note" (Step 5).                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 6.  The system validates that the text field is not empty.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 7.  If not empty, the use case proceeds to Step 7 (Save) and concludes.                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 8.  If empty, the system displays an error: "Lütfen geri gönderme nedeni girin." and returns to Step 4.                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-5.4.EX.1 (Database Save Error):                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 1.  At step 6 or 7, the system fails to save the note to the database.                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "Not kaydedilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 541-DB)".                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 3.  The system returns to the parent use case but prevents the parent action (e.g., the "Return to ÖİDB") from being finalized until the note is saved.                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 4.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a utility use case that is included by others).                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The visibility of the note must be restricted (as per the taslak: YGK + Faculty Board). The student and ÖİDB (unless specified) should not see these notes.                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: Notes must be logged (timestamped) and immutable (cannot be edited after saving).                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  This use case cannot be initiated by itself; it is always called from within another Dean's Office use case.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          | 2.  The parent use case (e.g., UC-5.1) is responsible for handling the application after this note is successfully saved.                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Add Administrative Comments (UC-5.4)

-   Administrative notes must be saved atomically; if saving fails (541-DB), the parent workflow (e.g., return to ÖİDB) must not proceed.

-   Notes must be visible only to authorized internal staff (Dean’s Office, YGK) and never to students.

-   Saved notes must be immutable (read-only) to preserve the audit trail.

-   Mandatory-note validation must reliably prevent saving an empty note when required.

-   The system must support high-volume note creation during peak periods without record locking.

-   Each saved note must be audit-logged with staff ID, timestamp, and linked application/package ID.

    1.  Use case 5 for user 5

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- -------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.5                                                
  Use Case Name:   Request Clarification from YGK                        
  Created By:      Group 1                          Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                       Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- -------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to return a finalized evaluation package to the YGK, requesting clarification or correction for a specific issue (e.g., missing intibak, incorrect justification). |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Dean's Office Staff is actively reviewing the YGK package (performing UC-5.2 or UC-5.3).                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is "In Review (Dean's Office)".                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The Staff has identified an error or inconsistency.                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 4.  This use case is triggered from UC-5.2.AC.1 or UC-5.3.AC.1.                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The package status is updated to "Waiting for Clarification (from YGK)" (YGK'dan Açıklama Bekleniyor).                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The package is routed back to the YGK work queue.                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  A notification and the clarification request (the note from UC-5.4) are sent to the YGK dashboard.                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
