|                          | 4.  This action triggers UC-4.9: Review Clarification Request.                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (occurs only if YGK evaluation packages contain errors).                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  While reviewing the YGK package (in UC-5.2 or UC-5.3), the Dean's Office Staff identifies an error.                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The Staff clicks the "Request Clarification" (Açıklama İste / YGK'ya Geri Gönder) button.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The system initiates UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments.                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 4.  The system displays a mandatory text field for the clarification message (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 3).                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 5.  The Staff types the clarification request (e.g., "1. Asil adayın intibak tablosu pakete eklenmemiş. Lütfen ekleyip tekrar gönderin.").                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 6.  The Staff saves the note (completing the UC-5.4 steps).                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 7.  The system updates the package status to "Waiting for Clarification (from YGK)" (Postcondition 1).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 8.  The system routes the package (with the new note) back to the YGK work queue and sends a notification (Postconditions 2, 3).                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-5.5.AC.1.STEP.2 (Staff Cancels Clarification Request):                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 1.  At step 2, the Staff clicks "Request Clarification" by mistake.                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  At step 4 (the UC-5.4 modal), the Staff clicks "Cancel" (İptal).                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates and returns control to the parent use case (e.g., UC-5.2).                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-5.5.EX.1 (YGK Queue Fails):                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 1.  At step 8, the system saves the note and status, but fails to route the package back to the YGK queue.                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "Paket YGK kuyruğuna geri gönderilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 551-QUEUE)".                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-5.4: Add Administrative Comments                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The clarification request (the note from UC-5.4) must be mandatory for this action.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: When this use case is triggered, the package must be "unlocked" to allow YGK to make corrections (e.g., re-run UC-4.5 or UC-4.6).                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | YGK has a corresponding use case (UC-4.9: Review Clarification Request) to handle a package returned by this use case.                                                                             |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Request Clarification from YGK (UC-5.5)

-   The system must reliably unlock the package for YGK edits while keeping it read-only for the Dean’s Office.

-   Only authorized Dean’s Office Staff may perform the return action.

-   A clarification note must be mandatory and validated before completing the return.

-   The interface must clearly differentiate the “Request Clarification” action from approval actions to avoid accidental triggers.

-   Every clarification request must be fully audit-logged with staff ID, timestamp, and note, preserving a traceable history for repeated clarification cycles.

    1.  Use case 6 for user 5

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- -------------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.6                                                            
  Use Case Name:   Track All Applications In Faculty Workflow                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                      Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                                   Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- -------------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to monitor the real-time status and workflow (YGK -> Dean's Office -> Faculty Board) of all applications within their specific faculty. |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  At least one application has been routed to the faculty (Postcondition of UC-2.4).                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The Dean's Office Staff has successfully logged in (with Dean's Office permissions).                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | The Dean's Office Staff is informed of the current status and bottlenecks of all applications within their faculty's workflow.                                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Daily (or multiple times per day) by Dean's Office managers during the evaluation period.                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Dean's Office Staff logs into the system.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The Staff navigates to the "Faculty Workflow" (Fakülte İş Akışı) screen/dashboard.                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a dashboard focused only on the Staff's faculty (e.g., "Mühendislik Fakültesi").                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the main workflow stages: YGK -> Dean's Office (Package Review) -> Faculty Board (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 2).                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 5.  The system displays widgets or lists showing the number of packages/applications at each stage:                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   "Pending YGK Review" (YGK İncelemesi Bekleyen - from UC-5.1): 25x                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   "Pending Dean's Office Review" (Dekanlık İncelemesi Bekleyen - from UC-4.8): 3x                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   "Pending Faculty Board Review" (Fakülte Kurulu Bekleyen - from UC-5.3): 2x                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |     -   "Completed" (Tamamlandı): 1x                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 6.  The system also lists "delayed" or "bottleneck" items (e.g., "3 applications pending 'Pending YGK Review' > 5 days"). (Matches taslak, Main Flow, Step 3).          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 7.  The Staff clicks on a status (e.g., "Pending YGK Review") to see the detailed list of those 25 applications.                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 8.  The Staff reviews the list to identify delays.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes, as the Staff has successfully monitored the workflow (Postcondition 1).                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-5.6.AC.1.STEP.3 (Staff Filters by Department):                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the Staff wishes to see the workflow for only one department within their faculty (e.g., "Bilgisayar Mühendisliği").                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The Staff uses the dashboard's filter controls.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  The system reloads the widgets (Step 4, 5) showing data only for that department.                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 4.  The use case continues from Step 7.                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a read-only reporting/monitoring use case).                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The dashboard data must be real-time or updated very frequently.                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The dashboard must provide "drill-down" functionality (clicking a status to see the detailed list).                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The dashboard must be strictly filtered to the Staff's own faculty.                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | This use case is primarily for monitoring, not for taking action. Action is taken in other use cases (e.g., UC-5.3 to forward a package, or UC-5.5 to return one).      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Track All Applications in Faculty Workflow (UC-5.6)

-   Dashboard data must be accurate and fully consistent with real-time application statuses.

-   Dashboard errors (561-DB) must not affect operational workflows; the system must fail gracefully without blocking navigation.

-   Dashboard must strictly enforce faculty-level data isolation; staff can only view applications under their own faculty.

-   Only authenticated Dean’s Office Staff may access the dashboard.

-   Workflow counts and status widgets must be interactive and support drill-down navigation.

-   Aggregation queries must remain performant even with thousands of active applications.

-   Access to the dashboard must be logged for oversight and monitoring.

    1.  Use case 7 for user 5

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-5.7                                              
  Use Case Name:   Notify Faculty Board Members                        
  Created By:      Group 1                        Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                     Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Dean's Office Staff                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Dean's Office staff to send a manual notification to all Faculty Board members to inform them that a new evaluation package is in their queue for review.                      |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The evaluation package has been successfully forwarded to the Faculty Board queue (Postcondition of UC-5.3: Forward Package to Faculty Board).                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is "Pending Faculty Board Review".                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 3.  The Dean's Office Staff is logged in.                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  An automated notification (e.g., email, system alert) is sent to all members of the Faculty Board.                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 2.  The notification (and the optional message) is logged.                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 3.  Faculty Board members are informed and prompted to start UC-6.1: Review Evaluation Package (as per the taslak, "Postconditions").                                                      |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per package, immediately after UC-5.3.                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  Immediately after completing UC-5.3 (Forward Package to Board), the Dean's Office Staff is on the main dashboard (e.g., UC-5.6).                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 2.  The Staff clicks the "Notify Faculty Board Members" (Kurul Üyelerini Bilgilendir) button for the package they just sent.                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a notification interface. (Taslak Step 1: "Notify Members" seçeneğini açar).                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 4.  The system shows a text field for an optional message.                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 5.  The Staff types an (optional) additional message (e.g., "Lütfen 3 gün içinde inceleyiniz."). (Taslak Step 2: "Mesaj veya açıklama ekler").                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 6.  The Staff clicks "Send Notification" (Bildirim Gönder).                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 7.  The system sends the notification (including the optional message) to all users with the "Faculty Board Member" role for that faculty (Taslak Step 3: "Sistem ... bildirim gönderir"). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 8.  The system logs the notification (Postcondition 2).                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-5.7.AC.1 (Staff Does Not Send Notification):                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |     1.  After completing UC-5.3, the Staff does not click the "Notify" button, assuming the Board members check their queues regularly.                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |     2.  This use case is not performed.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | -   UC-5.7.AC.2.STEP.5 (Staff Sends Notification Without Message):                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the Staff leaves the optional message field blank.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |     2.  The Staff clicks "Send Notification" (Step 6).                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |     3.  The system sends a default notification (e.g., "Yeni bir değerlendirme paketi kuyruğunuzdadır.").                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |     4.  The use case continues from Step 8.                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  UC-5.7.EX.1 (Notification Service Fails):                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 1.  At step 7, the system fails to send the notifications (e.g., email service is down).                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 2.  The system displays an error: "Bildirimler gönderilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 571-NOTIFY)".                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 3.  The use case terminates. (This is not critical, as the package is already in the Board's queue).                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | SR-1: The system must have a "group" or "role" (defined in UC-7.1) for "Faculty Board Members" to know who to send the notification to.                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  This is a manual "push" notification, as per the taslak.                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          | 2.  The list of "Faculty Board Members" is correctly configured in the system (by UC-7.1).                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Notify Faculty Board Members (UC-5.7)

-   The system must reliably send a notification to all users with the “Faculty Board Member” role and log the action.

-   Only authenticated Dean’s Office Staff may trigger the notification.

-   The system must ensure notifications are sent only when the package status is “Pending Faculty Board Review.”

-   The recipient list must be retrieved securely based on faculty-specific role configuration.

-   If the optional message is blank, the system must send a default notification template.

-   Notification failures must not affect the package status and must be logged using standardized error code 571-NOTIFY.

-   The interface must clearly allow adding an optional message and show a confirmation after sending.

-   The notification service must scale for faculties with many board members.

-   Notification templates must be configurable without code changes.

    1.  Use cases for user 6

        1.  Use case 1 for user 6

            1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- --------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-6.1                                           
  Use Case Name:   Review Evaluation Package                        
  Created By:      Group 1                     Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025                  Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- --------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Faculty Board Member                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables a Faculty Board Member to log in, access, and review the complete, finalized evaluation package (Asil/Yedek lists, intibak tables, and all notes) submitted by the YGK and forwarded by the Dean's Office.  |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The evaluation package has been forwarded by the Dean's Office (Postcondition of UC-5.3: Forward Package to Faculty Board).                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is "Pending Faculty Board Review".                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  The Faculty Board Member has successfully logged in (with Faculty Board permissions).                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The Board Member has reviewed the package.                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The package is now ready for a formal decision (Approve/Reject), enabling UC-6.2 or UC-6.3.                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per package per Faculty Board Member.                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Faculty Board Member logs into the system.                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The Member's dashboard displays a list of "Pending Packages" (Bekleyen Paketler) requiring their review (as per the taslak, Main Flow, Step 2).                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  The Member selects a package (e.g., "Bilgisayar Mühendisliği Değerlendirme Paketi") to review.                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 4.  The system displays the complete, read-only evaluation package. This view consolidates all information:                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     -   Asil List (from UC-4.4)                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     -   Yedek List (from UC-4.4)                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     -   Rejected List (with justifications from UC-4.7)                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     -   Intibak Tables (for all "Asil" students, from UC-4.5)                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     -   Notes from YGK (from UC-4.7)                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     -   Notes from Dean's Office (from UC-5.4)                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 5.  (This matches the taslak, Main Flow, Step 3 & 4).                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 6.  The Board Member reviews all components of the package to ensure compliance and fairness.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 7.  The use case concludes. The Member is now ready to perform UC-6.2 (Approve) or UC-6.3 (Reject).                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-6.1.AC.1.STEP.6 (Member Adds a Note Before Deciding):                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 1.  At step 6, before proceeding to the vote, the Member decides to add a query or comment.                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The Member initiates UC-6.4: Add Board-Level Notes.                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  After saving the note, the use case returns to Step 6 (review).                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-6.4: Add Board-Level Notes                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The package presented to the Board must be read-only (immutable) at this stage. No data (lists, intibaks) can be changed by the Board, only commented on (UC-6.4) or approved/rejected (UC-6.2 / UC-6.3). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: All notes from YGK (UC-4.7) and the Dean's Office (UC-5.4) must be clearly visible to the Board members.                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  This use case is only for "reviewing" (okuma). The "decision" (karar verme) is handled by UC-6.2 and UC-6.3.                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  All members of the Faculty Board (defined in UC-7.1) see the same package and notes.                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This is the first step in the Faculty Board workflow, triggered by UC-5.3.                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Review Evaluation Package (UC-6.1)

-   The system must reliably load the full, immutable package exactly as generated by YGK and approved by the Dean’s Office, with no possibility of data alteration.

-   Only authenticated Faculty Board Members may access the package, and access must be strictly read-only.

-   The interface must clearly present a consolidated summary (lists, intibak tables, notes) without requiring members to open individual files.

-   Notes from YGK and Dean’s Office must be visibly displayed to provide context for review.

-   Package load failures must be handled safely, allowing the user to retry or return, and must follow the standardized 611-PKG error schema.

-   The system must support multiple Board Members viewing the same package concurrently without performance issues.

-   All access events (package opened, by whom, when) must be logged for auditing.

-   All members must always see the exact same package version, preventing inconsistent or partial views.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 6

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-6.2                                 
  Use Case Name:   Approve Package                        
  Created By:      Group 1           Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    17.11.2025        Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | Faculty Board Member                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the Faculty Board (represented by an authorized member) to give the final, official approval for the YGK's evaluation package, digitally signing the decision and moving the package to the final publication queue. |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The Board Member has reviewed the package (Postcondition of UC-6.1: Review Evaluation Package).                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is "Pending Faculty Board Review".                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The Board Member is logged in.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The Faculty Board's "Approve" decision is logged and digitally signed.                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The package's status is updated to "Approved (Faculty Board)".                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  Automated notifications are sent to the Dean's Office and ÖİDB.                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  This action enables UC-6.5: Confirm Final List for Publication.                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per package                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The Faculty Board Member has completed their review (UC-6.1).                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The Member clicks the "Approve" (Onayla) button (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a digital signature/confirmation screen (e.g., "Kararı Fakülte Kurulu adına [Üye Adı] olarak onayla") (Taslak Step 2).                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  The Member confirms/signs the approval (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 5.  The system saves the Faculty Board's "Approve" decision and logs the digital signature (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 6.  The system updates the package's final status to "Approved (Faculty Board)" (Postcondition 2).                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 7.  The system sends automated notifications to the Dean's Office and ÖİDB (Taslak Step 4 / Postcondition 3).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 8.  The system enables UC-6.5 (Confirm for Publication) for the final approval step.                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-6.2.AC.1.STEP.2 (Member Adds a Note Before Approving):                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, before clicking "Approve", the member wants to add a final comment.                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The member initiates UC-6.4: Add Board-Level Notes.                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  After saving the note, the use case returns to Step 2.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | -   UC-6.2.AC.2.STEP.2 (Member Rejects Instead):                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, the Member clicks the "Reject" (Reddet) button instead.                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  This use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-6.3: Reject Package.                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-6.2.EX.1 (Digital Signature Fails):                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the system fails to save the member's vote/signature.                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Onay imzalanamadı. (Hata Kodu: 621-SIGN)".                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | -   UC-6.2.EX.2 (Notification Fails):                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the package is approved, but the notification to ÖİDB/Dean's Office fails.                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The system logs the notification error, but the use case concludes successfully (the approval is the critical part).                                                                                                 |
