|                          |     -   ÖİDB Officer                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   YDYO Officer                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   YGK Member (e.g., CENG)                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Dean's Office Staff (e.g., Mühendislik)                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Faculty Board Member (e.g., Mühendislik)                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 7.  The Admin clicks "Save Changes" (Değişiklikleri Kaydet).                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the user's role (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-7.1.AC.1.STEP.2 (Editing Role Permissions - Advanced):                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, the Admin navigates to the "Role Management" (Rol Yönetimi) screen instead.                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     2.  The Admin selects a role (e.g., "YGK Member") instead of a user.                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     3.  The system displays the list of permissions (yetki seviyeleri) for that role (e.g., "Can review application: YES", "Can approve application: YES", "Can add comments: YES", "Can export package: NO"). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     4.  The Admin modifies these permissions (e.g., changes "Can export package" to "YES" for the "YGK Chair" sub-role) (Taslak Step 4).                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     5.  The Admin saves the changes to the role.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes. (This change now affects all users with that role).                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | -   UC-7.1.AC.2.STEP.3 (Creating a New User):                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Admin clicks "Create New User" (Yeni Kullanıcı Oluştur).                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     2.  The Admin fills in the user's details (TCKN, Name, etc.) and assigns their roles (Step 6).                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     3.  The use case proceeds from Step 7.                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          | UC-7.1.EX.2 (User Not Found):                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the Admin searches for a user who does not exist.                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The system displays "Kullanıcı bulunamadı."                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  The use case returns to Step 3.                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must use a granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model.                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: Role assignment must be hierarchical (e.g., a "YGK Member" role must be tied to a specific department, "Mühendislik - CENG").                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: Changes to roles or permissions must be logged in an audit trail (who changed what, and when).                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  All users (except students, who may register themselves) are created in the system by the System Admin (AC.2).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The roles (Student, ÖİDB, YDYO, etc.) are predefined in the system; the Admin's main job is assigning users to them (Normal Flow) or tweaking the permissions of those roles (AC.1).                       |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is fundamental to the entire system, as all other use cases (e.g., UC-6.5, UC-4.8) have Special Requirements or Assumptions based on the roles defined and assigned here.                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Manage User Roles & Permissions (UC-7.1)

-   All role and permission edits must follow a strict RBAC model, enforcing faculty/department isolation where applicable.

-   Any change to roles or permissions must be logged as a critical security event with full details (who changed what, when, IP).

-   Permission updates must apply immediately (token refresh) or at worst on next login; no stale permissions allowed.

-   All updates must follow atomic save logic—failed saves must not leave users in partially updated or role-less states.

-   Duplicate user creation must be prevented (unique TCKN validation).

-   System must block deletion of the last remaining System Admin to avoid locking out administrative control.

-   All errors must follow standardized 711-DB error handling rules and fail safely without exposing sensitive data.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.2                                               
  Use Case Name:   Open/Close Application Period                        
  Created By:      Group 1                         Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                      Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to create new application periods (defining start/end dates and target departments), manually open or close them, or modify their dates.            |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | The System Admin has successfully logged into the system (with Admin-level privileges).                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A new application period is created or an existing one is modified.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  If the period is "Open" (and within the date range), the system allows students to start applications (enabling UC-1.1: Submit Application Form) (Taslak Postcondition). |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for system operation)                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (e.g., once or twice per year).                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "Application Period Settings" (Başvuru Dönemi Ayarları) screen (Taslak Step 1).                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a list of past and current application periods.                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  The Admin clicks "Create New Period" (Yeni Dönem Oluştur).                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 5.  The system displays a form for the new period.                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 6.  The Admin enters the required information (Taslak Step 2):                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     -   Period Name: (e.g., "2026-2027 Güz Yarıyılı Yatay Geçiş")                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     -   Start Date: (e.g., 01.07.2026)                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     -   End Date: (e.g., 15.07.2026)                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     -   Target Departments: (e.g., "Mühendislik Fakültesi - Tümü", "Mimarlık Fakültesi - Sadece Mimarlık")                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 7.  The Admin selects the "Open Period" (Dönemi Aç) option (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 8.  The Admin clicks "Save Period" (Dönemi Kaydet).                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 9.  The system validates the inputs (e.g., End Date is after Start Date).                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 10. The system saves the new application period and marks it as "Open".                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 11. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-7.2.AC.1.STEP.3 (Manually Close an Open Period):                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Admin sees a period is currently "Open".                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The Admin clicks "Edit" (Düzenle) for that period.                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The Admin selects the "Close Period" (Dönemi Kapat) option (Taslak Step 4).                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     4.  The Admin clicks "Save Period".                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     5.  The system immediately stops accepting new student applications, regardless of the End Date.                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | -   UC-7.2.AC.2.STEP.3 (Extend an Open Period):                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Admin sees an "Open" period.                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The Admin clicks "Edit" (Düzenle).                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The Admin changes the "End Date" to a later date (e.g., from 15.07.2026 to 20.07.2026) (Taslak Step 4).                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     4.  The Admin clicks "Save Period".                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     5.  The system saves the new End Date, allowing students to continue applying until the new date.                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-7.2.EX.1 (Invalid Date Range):                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 9 (Normal Flow), the system validates the dates and finds the "End Date" is before the "Start Date".                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Geçersiz tarih aralığı. Bitiş tarihi, başlangıç tarihinden sonra olmalıdır."                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 5.                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must strictly enforce the Start Date and End Date. Students (Actor 1) must be blocked from initiating UC-1.1 outside of an "Open" period's date range.  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must allow the Admin to select which departments are accepting applications for this period. (This links to UC-7.3: Configure Department Quotas).       |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The "Target Departments" selection (Step 6) controls which departments are visible to students in the UC-1.1 form.                                                           |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is the master switch for the entire application intake process.                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Open/Close Application Period (UC-7.2)

-   Only authenticated System Admin users may access and modify application period settings.

-   Date validation must be fully reliable; invalid ranges must be rejected instantly and never saved.

-   Period status changes must propagate system-wide within seconds, immediately enabling or blocking student applications.

-   Updated period states must be reflected in all related workflows (e.g., UC-1.2 student application) without requiring system restart.

-   “Target Departments” must always be validated against active departments to prevent invalid configurations.

-   All changes must be logged as critical admin events (who changed what, when).

-   Errors must follow the standardized 721-DB code and fail safely without exposing internal details.

    1.  Use case 3 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.3                                             
  Use Case Name:   Configure Department Quotas                        
  Created By:      Group 1                       Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                    Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to define the initial "Asil" (Admitted) and "Yedek" (Waitlisted) quotas for each department participating in an active application period. |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  An application period has been created and is open (Postcondition of UC-7.2: Open/Close Application Period).                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The System Admin has successfully logged in (with Admin-level privileges)                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The Asil/Yedek initial quotas are saved and associated with the application period for each specific department.                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The YGK ranking algorithm (UC-4.4: Rank All Applicants) will read these quotas as the default values (as per the taslak, Postcondition).                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for ranking)                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Once per application period (or low, if updates are needed).                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "Application Period Settings" (from UC-7.2).                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 3.  The Admin selects the currently "Open" application period (e.g., "2026-2027 Güz").                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 4.  The Admin clicks the "Configure Quotas" (Kontenjanları Ayarla) button for this period.                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 5.  The system displays a list of all departments that were included in this period (e.g., "Bilgisayar Müh.", "Mimarlık", "Endüstriyel Tasarım") (Taslak Step 1).   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 6.  Next to each department name, the system provides two editable fields: "Asil Kontenjan" and "Yedek Kontenjan".                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 7.  The Admin enters the initial approved quota numbers for each department (e.g., "Bilgisayar Müh." -> Asil: 5, Yedek: 10) (Taslak Step 2).                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 8.  After filling out the list, the Admin clicks "Save All Quotas" (Tüm Kontenjanları Kaydet).                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 9.  The system validates the inputs (e.g., must be zero or a positive integer).                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 10. The system saves these quota numbers to the database for this specific period (Taslak Step 3 / Postcondition 1).                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 11. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-7.3.AC.1.STEP.5 (Admin Updates Quotas Mid-Period):                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     1.  The Admin follows steps 1-4.                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     2.  The system displays the list (Step 5) with the previously saved quota numbers (Step 7).                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     3.  The Admin changes a quota (e.g., "Mimarlık" Asil quota from 3 to 4).                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     4.  The use case proceeds from Step 8. (The system saves the new value).                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | -   UC-7.3.AC.2.STEP.7 (Admin Enters Zero Quota):                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, for "Makine Müh.", the Admin enters "Asil: 0" and "Yedek: 0" (as that department is not accepting students this term).                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     2.  The system accepts this as a valid entry.                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     3.  The use case proceeds. (When YGK runs UC-4.4 for this department, all applicants will be rejected).                                                         |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-7.3.EX.1 (Invalid Input):                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     1.  At step 9 (Validation), the system detects a non-numeric (e.g., "üç") or negative (e.g., "-1") value.                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Lütfen tüm kontenjan alanlarına geçerli, pozitif tam sayılar (veya 0) girin."                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 7.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | -   UC-7.3.EX.2 (No Period Open):                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Admin tries to configure quotas, but no application period is "Open" (i.e., UC-7.2 has not been performed).                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     2.  The "Configure Quotas" button (Step 4) is disabled or hidden.                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     3.  The system displays a message: "Kontenjan atamak için önce bir başvuru dönemi açmalısınız."                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |     4.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The quotas must be configurable per department and per application period.                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The YGK ranking screen (UC-4.4) must read these values.                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             |                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Configure Department Quotas (UC-7.3)

-   All quota values must be validated as non-negative integers; invalid inputs must be rejected immediately.

-   The save action must be atomic—either all department quotas are saved together or none of them.

-   Saved quotas must become the exact defaults used later by YGK Members in UC-4.4 without transformation.

-   The interface must display departments in a clear editable table, using numeric-only fields and allowing “0” as valid input.

-   Department list must be dynamically fetched from the active department registry (never hard-coded).

-   Quotas must always be tied to the correct Application Period ID and Department ID to avoid cross-period corruption.

-   All quota changes must be recorded in the audit log with admin identity, timestamp, period ID, and before/after snapshot.

-   Errors must follow the standardized 711-DB / 721-DB style scheme and fail safely without applying partial updates.

    1.  Use case 4 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.4                                             
  Use Case Name:   Manage System-Wide Settings                        
  Created By:      Group 1                       Last Updated By:

  ---------------- ----------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to configure global business rules and technical parameters that govern the entire system's behavior (e.g., file size limits, log durations, department-specific rules, API settings). |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | The System Admin has successfully logged in (with Admin-level privileges).                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The system's global configuration settings are updated.                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  All other use cases that depend on these settings (e.g., UC-1.2, UC-4.2) will read the new values (Taslak Postcondition).                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for system operation)                                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (Used during initial setup and for occasional tweaks).                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "System-Wide Settings" (Sistem Ayarları) screen (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 3.  The system displays various configuration tabs (e.g., "File Settings", "Business Rules", "API Settings", "Log Settings").                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 4.  The Admin selects the "File Settings" (Dosya Ayarları) tab.                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 5.  The Admin modifies the values (Taslak Step 2):                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     -   "Max File Size (MB):" (e.g., changes from "10" to "15")                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     -   "Allowed File Formats:" (e.g., adds "zip" to "pdf, jpg, png")                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 6.  The Admin clicks the "Save Settings" (Ayarları Kaydet) button (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 7.  The system validates the inputs (e.g., file size is numeric).                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 8.  The system saves the new configuration and displays a success message: "Ayarlar başarıyla güncellendi."                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 9.  (The next time a student performs UC-1.2, the system will enforce a 15MB limit and allow ".zip" files).                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-7.4.AC.1.STEP.3 (Configuring Department-Specific Rules):                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Admin selects the "Business Rules" (İş Kuralları) tab.                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     2.  The Admin selects the "Department-Specific Conditions" (Bölüm Özel Koşulları) sub-section (this configures UC-4.2).                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     3.  The Admin selects "Mimarlık" (Architecture).                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     4.  The Admin defines the rule: "Required Course: 'Design Studio', Min. Grade: 'AA', Required Document: 'Portfolio'".                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |     5.  The use case proceeds from Step 6 (Save).                                                                                                                                                               |

| Exceptions:              | -   UC-7.4.EX.1 (Invalid Input):                                                                                                                                                                                |

|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 5.                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | (This use case configures the rules for other use cases, such as UC-7.6 and UC-7.5, but does not "Include" them as a sub-routine.)                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: Changes to these settings must be logged in a high-priority audit trail (who changed what, and when).                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: Sensitive settings (like API keys in AC.2) must be encrypted when stored.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The system must provide sensible defaults for all settings.                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  These settings are global and immediately affect the entire system's operation.                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          | 2.  The Admin has the technical and business knowledge to configure these settings correctly.                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This is a "catch-all" configuration use case. It defines the rules that many other use cases (like UC-1.2, UC-4.2, UC-1.6, UC-2.7, UC-7.5, UC-7.6) read and enforce.                                            |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Manage System-Wide Settings (UC-7.4)

-   Only authenticated users with the System Admin role can view or change system-wide settings.

-   All configuration changes must be atomic: on any save failure, the system must continue using the last valid configuration.

-   Sensitive fields (e.g. API keys for YÖKSİS/ÖSYM) must be encrypted at rest and masked in the UI (e.g. ******, with explicit “re-generate / reveal” flows if needed).

-   Every configuration change must be audit-logged with admin ID, timestamp, and before/after values for each modified setting.

-   Inputs must be strictly validated (numeric checks, URL format checks, allowed ranges) to prevent invalid values that could break runtime behaviour.

-   Log retention and similar legal/record-keeping values must respect minimum legal limits and disallow configurations below those thresholds.

-   Configuration data should be cacheable and centrally managed, so runtime use cases (file upload, rule engine, quotas, etc.) read from fast, consistent config, not per-request DB queries.

-   New configuration parameters must be easy to add (data-driven / metadata-driven), without major code or UI rewrites.

-   Configuration save errors (e.g. 741-CONFIG) must follow the standard error-code scheme and trigger alerts, as broken settings can affect the whole system.

    1.  Use case 5 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.5                                              
  Use Case Name:   Monitor System Health & Logs                        
  Created By:      Group 1                        Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                     Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to monitor the system's real-time performance, review error logs, and check the status of external API connections (YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, etc.).                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The System Admin has successfully logged in (with Admin-level privileges).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The system is running.                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The Admin is informed of the system's current health and performance.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The Admin may have identified and taken action on an error (e.g., restarted a service).                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The system remains stable (as per the taslak, Postcondition).                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for system stability)                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (checked daily or multiple times per day by the Admin).                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "System Health Dashboard" (Sistem Sağlığı Ekranı) (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  The system displays the dashboard, which includes several real-time (or near real-time) technical widgets (Taslak Step 2):                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     -   Widget 1 (API Connection Status): Shows the status of external API connections (YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI) configured in UC-7.4 / UC-7.6. (e.g., "YÖKSİS: Connected", "ÖSYM: Error/Timeout"). |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     -   Widget 2 (Performance Graphs): Shows real-time server CPU, memory usage, and database response times.                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     -   Widget 3 (Error Logs): Shows a live feed of recent critical errors (e.g., "Hata Kodu: 431-CALC" or "Hata Kodu: 511-QUEUE").                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 4.  The Admin reviews these indicators and confirms that all systems are "Green" (Normal).                                                                                                    |
