|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 5.  The use case concludes, as the system is stable (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-7.5.AC.1.STEP.3 (Admin Intervenes on a Failed API):                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 3 (Widget 1), the Admin sees "ÖSYM: Error/Timeout".                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The Admin clicks on the "ÖSYM" status.                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The system initiates UC-7.6: Manage API Integrations for the ÖSYM API.                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     4.  The Admin uses UC-7.6 to test the connection or re-enter the API key (Taslak Step 3: "hata çözümü için müdahale yapılır.").                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     5.  After fixing the connection via UC-7.6, the Admin returns to this use case (UC-7.5) and confirms the status is now "Green".                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     6.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | -   UC-7.5.AC.2.STEP.3 (Admin Investigates Error Logs):                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     1.  At step 3 (Widget 3), the Admin sees a repeated error (e.g., "Hata Kodu: 481-PKG").                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     2.  The Admin clicks the error log.                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     3.  The system displays the detailed stack trace for the error.                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     4.  The Admin uses this information to investigate the bug (Taslak Step 3: "hata çözümü için müdahale yapılır.").                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |     5.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-7.6: Manage API Integrations (This is conditionally triggered in AC.1 to fix a failed API).                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The dashboard must be real-time or near real-time.                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The dashboard must provide "drill-down" functionality (clicking an error to see the log, clicking an API to manage it).                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The system must have comprehensive logging (configured in UC-7.4) for this use case to be effective.                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The Admin has the technical expertise to understand API status, performance graphs, and error logs.                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          | 2.  The system is hosted in an environment that exposes performance metrics (CPU, memory) to the application.                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is the primary monitoring tool for the technical health of the system, whereas UC-2.7 (ÖİDB) and UC-5.6 (Dean's Office) are for monitoring the business workflow health.        |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Monitor System Health & Logs (UC-7.5)

-   Monitoring failures must be isolated and must not affect the core application.

-   Access must be restricted to System Admin only; logs must be sanitized to avoid exposing PII.

-   The error log feed must handle high-volume entries without freezing and always show the most recent events.

-   Configuration, log-level settings, and error codes must follow system-wide standards.

-   Opening the dashboard and all admin interventions must be logged for audit purposes.

-   If the dashboard fails to load (“751-LOG”), an external alert must be triggered for the Admin.

    1.  Use case 6 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.6                                         
  Use Case Name:   Manage API Integrations                        
  Created By:      Group 1                   Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to configure, save, test, and activate the system's connections to external APIs (YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI, e-Devlet) for automatic data verification.                                             |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The System Admin has successfully logged in (with Admin-level privileges).                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The Admin has obtained the necessary, valid API keys and endpoint URLs from the external institutions (e.g., YÖK, ÖSYM).                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The API credentials (keys, endpoints) are securely saved and encrypted.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The connection is marked as "Active".                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The system is now capable of performing automated data verification (enabling the Actor 8 use cases, e.g., UC-8.1, UC-8.2). (Taslak Postcondition).                                                              |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for system operation)                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (Used during initial setup and when API keys expire).                                                                                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "API Management" (API Yönetimi) panel (which may be part of UC-7.4) (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a list of external APIs (e.g., YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI).                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 4.  The Admin clicks "Configure" (Yapılandır) for the "YÖKSİS API".                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 5.  The Admin enters the API connection details into the form (Taslak Step 2):                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   API Endpoint URL: (e.g., https://api.yoksis.gov.tr/v1/)                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   API Key / Client ID: (e.g., "A1B2C3D4...")                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     -   API Secret: (e.g., "Z9Y8X7...")                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 6.  The Admin clicks the "Test Connection" (Bağlantıyı Test Et) button (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 7.  The system sends a test request (e.g., an authentication "ping") to the YÖKSİS endpoint using the new credentials.                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 8.  The system receives a successful response (e.g., "HTTP 200 - Connection Successful").                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 9.  The Admin clicks the "Activate Connection" (Bağlantıyı Aktif Hale Getir) checkbox (Taslak Step 4).                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 10. The Admin clicks "Save Settings".                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 11. The system encrypts and saves the credentials and marks the "YÖKSİS API" status as "Active".                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 12. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-7.6.AC.1.STEP.7 (Connection Test Fails):                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the system sends the test request.                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The system receives an error response (e.g., "HTTP 401 Unauthorized" or "Connection Timeout").                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The system displays an error message: "Bağlantı testi başarısız: Yetkisiz Anahtar. Lütfen API anahtarını kontrol edin."                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The "Activate Connection" checkbox (Step 9) remains disabled.                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     5.  The use case returns to Step 5 (Admin must correct the settings).                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | -   UC-7.6.AC.2.STEP.4 (Deactivating an API):                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     1.  At step 4, the Admin selects the "YÖKSİS API" which is currently "Active".                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     2.  The Admin un-checks the "Activate Connection" checkbox (e.g., YÖKSİS is down for maintenance).                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     3.  The Admin clicks "Save Settings" (Step 10).                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     4.  The system marks the API as "Inactive". (This will cause UC-1.2 to trigger its exception flow, UC-1.2.EX.1, until this API is re-activated).                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |     5.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This use case is configured by UC-7.4 and monitored by UC-7.5).                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: All sensitive data (API Keys, Secrets) must be stored in an encrypted format.                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: A "Test Connection" function (Step 6) is mandatory before an API can be "Activated".                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The Admin has received the API keys through an external, offline process.                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          | 2.  This use case provides the technical setup required for the "Actor 8" (External Verification Systems) use cases to function.                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is the technical backbone for automated verification. If this use case is not performed or if an API is "Inactive", the system must gracefully degrade (as in UC-1.1.EX.1) to allow manual data entry. |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Manage API Integrations (UC-7.6)

-   API keys/secrets must be encrypted at rest and masked in the UI; access is limited to System Admins only.

-   “Activate Connection” must only be enabled after a successful Test Connection to prevent invalid configurations.

-   Saving settings must be atomic — failures must not mark an API as active (“761-DB”).

-   API settings must be cached system-wide so high-traffic use cases do not hit the database on every request.

-   The module should support adding new API providers without core code changes.

-   All changes (key updates, activations/deactivations) must be logged with Admin ID, timestamp, and IP.

-   If an API is deactivated, dependent workflows must immediately fall back to manual entry or degradation logic.

    1.  Use case 7 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.7                                               
  Use Case Name:   Reset or Unlock User Accounts                        
  Created By:      Group 1                         Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                      Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to manually reset a user's password or unlock an account that has been locked due to failed login attempts.                                                         |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The System Admin has successfully logged in (with Admin-level privileges).                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  A user account is inaccessible (e.g., "Kullanıcının kilitli/erişimsiz bir hesabı olmalı" - as in UC-1.1.AC.3) or the user has requested a password reset (e.g., via a help desk ticket). |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The user's account is "Unlocked" or has a new temporary password.                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The user is notified of their new login information.                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The user can access the system again (as per the taslak: "Kullanıcı tekrar sisteme erişebilir.").                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium (Important for support, but not a primary workflow)                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (occurs only on user request or lockout).                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "User Management" (Kullanıcı Yönetimi) screen (UC-7.1).                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The Admin searches for and finds the user (e.g., "Ahmet Yılmaz") (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  The Admin opens the user's profile and sees their status (e.g., "Status: Locked (Too many attempts)").                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 5.  The Admin clicks the "Unlock Account" (Hesap Kilidini Aç) button (Taslak Step 2).                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 6.  The system displays a confirmation prompt.                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 7.  The Admin confirms.                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 8.  The system updates the user's status to "Active".                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 9.  The Admin manually informs the user (e.g., via email) that their account is unlocked and they can try logging in again with their old password.                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-7.7.AC.1.STEP.4 (Reset Password):                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 1.  At step 4, the Admin sees the user forgot their password.                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  The Admin clicks the "Reset Password" (Şifre Sıfırla) button (Taslak Step 2).                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 3.  The system displays two options: "Generate Temporary Password" or "Send Password Reset Link".                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 4.  The Admin selects "Send Password Reset Link".                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 5.  The system sends an automated email to the user's registered address with a secure link (Taslak Step 3: "Sistem kullanıcıya yeni giriş bilgisi gönderir").                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 6.  The Admin informs the user (if necessary) to check their email.                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 7.  The use case concludes (Postcondition 3).                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-7.7.EX.1 (User Not Found):                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 3, the Admin searches for a user who does not exist.                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The system displays "Kullanıcı bulunamadı."                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates.                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | -   UC-7.7.EX.2 (Notification Service Fails):                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     1.  At step 5 (AC.1), the system fails to send the password reset email.                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Şifre sıfırlama e-postası gönderilemedi. (Hata Kodu: 771-NOTIFY)".                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |     3.  The use case terminates (the password is not reset).                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This use case utilizes the interface of UC-7.1 but is a distinct action).                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: All password reset actions must be logged in the audit trail.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The automated password reset link (AC.1) must be secure, single-use, and time-limited (e.g., expires in 1 hour).                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The "Forgot Password" feature on the login screen (mentioned in UC-1.1.AC.1) is the student's self-service method. This use case (UC-7.7) is the Admin's manual override/support method.     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case is a manual support/administrative task, distinct from the automated password reset flow available to students.                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  User interface

2.  []Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Reset or Unlock User Accounts (UC-7.7)

-   Password reset emails must use single-use, time-limited, cryptographically secure links; temporary passwords must force a mandatory change at next login.

-   If the notification service fails (“771-NOTIFY”), the system must avoid leaving the user with no valid credentials and should not invalidate the old password.

-   Unlocking an account must also clear the failed-login counter to allow immediate login.

-   Only System Admins may perform unlock/reset actions; sensitive information must be protected.

-   The module must scale to large user datasets and maintain quick search operations.

-   The “771-NOTIFY” error must follow the system-wide code standard.

-   All actions (unlock, reset email sent, temp password generated) must be logged with Admin ID, user ID, timestamp, and IP for full auditability.

    1.  Use case 8 for user 7

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-7.8                                              
  Use Case Name:   Manage Notification Settings                        
  Created By:      Group 1                        Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                     Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- --

+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | System Admin                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the System Admin to configure the system's automated notification (email and in-system alerts) triggers and edit their content templates.                                                              |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The System Admin has successfully logged in (with Admin-level privileges).                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The notification module (e.g., email service) is active and configured (as per the taslak).                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The notification rules (triggers) and templates are updated in the system.                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The system will use these new rules and templates when sending notifications (e.g., when UC-2.5 is performed) (Taslak Postcondition).                                                                      |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | Medium                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Low (Used during initial setup and for occasional tweaks).                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  The System Admin logs into the "Admin Panel".                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The Admin navigates to the "Notification Settings" (Bildirim Ayarları) screen (which may be part of UC-7.4) (Taslak Step 1).                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  The system displays a list of all automated notification events (Taslak Step 2), for example:                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Event: "Results Published" (Triggered by: UC-2.5) [Enabled / Disabled] [Edit Template]                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Event: "Application Returned for Correction" (Triggered by: UC-2.2) [Enabled / Disabled] [Edit Template]                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Event: "Password Reset Link" (Triggered by: UC-7.7) [Enabled / Disabled] [Edit Template]                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     -   Event: "Appeal Decision Finalized" (Triggered by: UC-2.6) [Enabled / Disabled] [Edit Template]                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 4.  The Admin clicks "Edit Template" (Şablonu Düzenle) for the "Results Published" event.                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 5.  The system displays an editor for the notification template (e.g., Email Subject, Email Body).                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 6.  The Admin edits the text, using placeholders (e.g., Sayın [Student.Name], [Application.ID] numaralı başvurunuz sonuçlanmıştır...).                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 7.  The Admin clicks the "Save Settings" (Ayarları Kaydet) button (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 8.  The system validates the template (e.g., ensures required placeholders are present).                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 9.  The system saves the new template (Postcondition 1).                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 10. The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-7.8.AC.1.STEP.3 (Disabling a Notification):                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the Admin finds the "Application Returned for Correction" event.                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  The Admin clicks the toggle switch from "Enabled" to "Disabled" (Taslak Step 2).                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  The Admin saves the change (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 4.  (The next time UC-2.2 is performed, the system will not send an email notification to the student).                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 5.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-7.8.EX.1 (Invalid Template):                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     1.  At step 8 (Validation), the Admin saves a template but deleted a mandatory placeholder (e.g., [Student.Name]).                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     2.  The system displays an error: "Şablon doğrulaması başarısız. Zorunlu alan [Student.Name] eksik."                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |     3.  The use case returns to Step 5.                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |  EX.Global.5                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |  EX.Global.1                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None. (This is a configuration use case, likely part of the UC-7.4 interface).                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must support both email and in-system (dashboard) notification types.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The template editor must support dynamic placeholders (variables) like [Student.Name], [Application.Result], [YGK.Note], etc.                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          | 3.  SR-3: The system must provide a "master switch" to enable or disable specific notifications (AC.1).                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The events (triggers) themselves are hard-coded by the developers (e.g., UC-2.5 always tries to trigger "Results Published"). This use case only determines if the notification is "Enabled" and what it says. |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

User interface

[]

Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Manage Notification Settings (UC-7.8)

-   Saving templates must be atomic; DB failures (“781-DB”) revert to the previous valid version.

-   Sensitive fields must be sanitized (XSS protection) and accessible only to System Admins.

-   Template updates and enable/disable states must propagate to the notification service within a few seconds.

-   Template engine must gracefully handle missing runtime placeholders without breaking dispatch.

-   Templates must be cached to avoid DB hits during high-volume notifications.

-   All changes must be logged with Admin ID, timestamp, and event type (audit requirement).

-   Mandatory placeholders must be validated before saving.

    1.  Use cases for user 8

        1.  Use case 1 for user 8

            1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-8.1                                               
  Use Case Name:   Provide Identity Verification                        
  Created By:      Group 1                         Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                      Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | External Verification System (NVI / e-Devlet / MERNİS)                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the External Verification System (Actor) to receive a query from our system (the "Undergraduate Transfer Management System") and return a "Match" or "Not Match" response for a student's identity credentials (TCKN, Name, DOB). |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The main system (UC-1.1: Submit Application Form) is being executed by a Student.                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The student has provided their TCKN, Ad, Soyad, and Doğum Tarihi.                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The API connection for this external service is "Active" (Postcondition of UC-7.6: Manage API Integrations).                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A "Match: True" or "Match: False" response is returned to the main system (Taslak Postcondition).                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The main system (UC-1.1) uses this response to mark the student's identity as "Verified" or "Unverified".                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for UC-1.1)                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (Triggered once for every execution of UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is "included" (called) by UC-1.1 (Submit Application Form).                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The External API (this actor) receives an API request from our system. The request payload contains the student's TCKN, Name, Surname, and Date of Birth (Taslak Step 1).                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The External API validates the incoming request (e.g., checks the API key configured in UC-7.6).                                                                                                                                      |
