|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The External API queries its internal database (e.g., MERNİS) to verify the TCKN/Name/DOB combination (Taslak Step 2).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 5.  The system finds a direct match.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 6.  The External API returns a successful response (e.g., HTTP 200) with a body indicating "Match: True" (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 7.  The use case concludes. (Control is returned to UC-1.1, which proceeds with its Normal Flow).                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     |  UC-8.1.AC.1.STEP.5 (Identity Not Match):                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 1.  At step 5 (Normal Flow), the External API determines the provided TCKN/Name/DOB combination does not match its records.                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The External API returns a successful response (e.g., HTTP 200) with a body indicating "Match: False" (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The use case concludes. (Control is returned to UC-1.2, which must now trigger its own alternative course, e.g., "Kimlik bilgileri MERNİS ile uyuşmuyor.").                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.2                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                          | UC-8.1.EX.2 (Authorization Error):                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 1.  At step 3, the External API determines the API Key sent by our system is invalid or expired.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The External API includes UC-8.6: Provide Status Codes for Error Handling.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The External API returns an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error.                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The use case terminates. (This triggers UC-1.1.EX.1 and alerts the Admin via UC-7.5).                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-8.6: Provide Status Codes for Error Handling (Conditionally included in EX.2).                                                                                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The API connection must be secure (HTTPS).                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The API response time must be fast (e.g., < 2 seconds) to support real-time form validation in UC-1.1.                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  This use case cannot be initiated by itself; it is always triggered by our system (specifically, UC-1.2).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  This actor (NVI/MERNİS) provides a synchronous "match/no-match" service.                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Provide Identity Verification (UC-8.1)

-   All identity data (TCKN, name, DOB) must be sent over encrypted HTTPS using the API key defined in UC-7.6.

-   A “Match: False” response is valid and must trigger the appropriate user message.

-   If the API is down or unreachable, the system must gracefully degrade without blocking the student.

-   System must correctly format requests per NVI/MERNİS protocol and log standard HTTP status codes for debugging.

-   Logs must not store sensitive identity details—only masked TCKN, timestamp, and result.

-   A “Match: True” response must lock the verified identity fields against further editing.

-   Authorization failures (HTTP 401) must trigger an admin alert.

    1.  Use case 2 for user 8

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-8.2                                                                 
  Use Case Name:   Provide Academic Records (GPA, Active Semester)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                                           Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                                        Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | External System (YÖKSİS API - Yükseköğretim Bilgi Sistemi)                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the External System (YÖKSİS) to receive a query from our system and return the student's official academic records, including GPA, active semester, current institution, and disciplinary status. |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The main system (UC-1.1: Submit Application Form) is being executed by a Student.                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The student's identity (TCKN) has been verified (UC-8.1).                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The API connection for YÖKSİS is "Active" (Postcondition of UC-7.6).                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The student's academic data (GPA, Semester, Institution) is returned to the main system.                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The main system populates the application form fields with this authoritative data (Taslak Postcondition).                                                                                            |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for automation and accuracy)                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (Triggered once for every execution of UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is "included" (called) by UC-1.1 (Submit Application Form).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  Our system sends a secure API request to YÖKSİS containing the student's verified TCKN (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 3.  The YÖKSİS API validates the request credentials.                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 4.  The YÖKSİS API queries its central student database using the TCKN (Taslak Step 2).                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 5.  The API retrieves the student's active enrollment record.                                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 6.  The API constructs a response object containing:                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Current Institution: (e.g., "Dokuz Eylül Üniversitesi")                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Department: (e.g., "Bilgisayar Mühendisliği")                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   GPA: (e.g., "3.45")                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Active Semester: (e.g., "3" - meaning 2nd year Fall)                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Status: (e.g., "Active Student")                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     -   Disciplinary Record: (e.g., "Clean")                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 7.  The API sends this data back to our system (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 8.  Our system receives the data and auto-fills the relevant fields in the application form (Taslak Step 4).                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes. (Control is returned to UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-8.2.AC.1.STEP.5 (Student Not Found / No Active Record):                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the YÖKSİS API cannot find an active student record for the given TCKN.                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The API returns a "Not Found" or "No Active Enrollment" error code.                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  Our system displays a warning to the student: "YÖKSİS üzerinde aktif öğrencilik kaydı bulunamadı."                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     4.  The use case concludes. (Depending on UC-1.1 rules, the student might be blocked or allowed to enter data manually with proof).                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | -   UC-8.2.AC.2.STEP.5 (Multiple Records Found):                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the API finds multiple active records (e.g., Double Major or two universities).                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     2.  The API returns a list of all active programs.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     3.  Our system displays a selection modal to the Student: "Lütfen yatay geçiş yapmak istediğiniz (kaynak) programı seçin."                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     4.  The Student selects one.                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |     5.  The use case proceeds with the data from the selected program.                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.2                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The data returned by YÖKSİS is considered "authoritative" and should generally be read-only in the form to prevent fraud, unless the API fails.                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must handle different GPA scales (e.g., 100 vs 4.00) if YÖKSİS returns raw data. (Currently assuming YÖKSİS standardizes this).                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The student has a valid, active record in YÖKSİS.                                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          | 2.  The TCKN provided is correct and belongs to the user.                                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This use case drastically reduces the workload for ÖİDB in UC-2.1 by ensuring data is pre-validated at the source.                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Provide Academic Records (GPA, Active Semester) (UC-8.2)

-   If YÖKSİS is unavailable or times out, the system must allow immediate manual data entry without blocking the student.

-   Retrieved data is authoritative; on success, GPA and semester fields must become read-only to prevent tampering.

-   API calls must use secure credentials from UC-7.6 and must only query the verified student’s TCKN.

-   If multiple active programs exist (e.g., double major), the student must select the source program.

-   If no active record exists, display: “YÖKSİS üzerinde aktif öğrencilik kaydı bulunamadı.”

-   The system must correctly map YÖKSİS fields to local values and handle differing GPA scales.

-   Integration must handle HTTP 404 vs 500 to distinguish “not found” vs “system error.”

-   Fetching academic data must comply with KVKK—only required fields may be stored.

-   Every query must be logged with masked TCKN, timestamp, and result; manual-entry cases must be flagged for ÖİDB review.

    1.  Use case 3 for user 8

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ----------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-8.3                                                   
  Use Case Name:   Provide National Exam Score (YKS)                        
  Created By:      Group 1                             Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                          Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ----------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | External System (ÖSYM API - Student Selection and Placement Center)                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the External System (ÖSYM) to receive a query from our system and return the student's official national university entrance exam scores (YKS) and placement ranking for a specific exam year. |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The main system (UC-1.1: Submit Application Form) is being executed by a Student.                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  The student's identity (TCKN) has been verified (UC-8.1).                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 3.  The API connection for ÖSYM is "Active" (Postcondition of UC-7.6).                                                                                                                                 |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The student's official exam score (Placement Score) and ranking (Success Order) are returned to the main system.                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  The main system saves this data to be used in the Transfer Score calculation (UC-4.3) (Taslak Postcondition).                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Critical for scoring and ranking)                                                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (Triggered once for every execution of UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is "included" (called) by UC-1.1 (Submit Application Form).                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  Our system prompts the student to select the "Exam Year" (e.g., 2023).                                                                                                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 3.  Our system sends a secure API request to ÖSYM containing the verified TCKN and the selected Year (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 4.  The ÖSYM API validates the request credentials.                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 5.  The ÖSYM API queries its database for the student's results for that year.                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 6.  The API retrieves the detailed result card.                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 7.  The API constructs a response object containing:                                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     -   Exam Year: (e.g., 2023)                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     -   Score Type: (e.g., SAY - Sayısal)                                                                                                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     -   Placement Score (Yerleştirme Puanı): (e.g., "450.12345") (Taslak Step 2)                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     -   Success Order (Başarı Sırası): (e.g., "12,500") (Taslak Step 2)                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     -   Placed Program: (e.g., "Dokuz Eylül Üni. - Bilgisayar Müh.")                                                                                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 8.  The API sends this data back to our system.                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 9.  Our system receives the data and auto-fills the "Exam Score" fields in the application form.                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 10. The system saves this verified score for later use in the auto-calculation formula.                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 11. The use case concludes. (Control is returned to UC-1.1).                                                                                                                                           |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-8.3.AC.1.STEP.5 (No Exam Record for Year):                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the ÖSYM API cannot find a record for the student in the requested year (e.g., student did not take the exam that year).                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     2.  The API returns a "Not Found" error.                                                                                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     3.  Our system displays an error: "Seçilen yıl (2023) için ÖSYM kaydı bulunamadı. Lütfen yılı kontrol edin."                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     4.  The use case returns to Step 2 (Select Year).                                                                                                                                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | -   UC-8.3.AC.2.STEP.7 (Score Type Mismatch):                                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     1.  At step 7, the API returns a score type (e.g., SÖZ - Sözel) that is not valid for the target department (e.g., Computer Engineering requires SAY).                                             |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     2.  Our system flags this discrepancy to the student: "Uyarı: Başvurduğunuz bölüm SAY puan türü gerektirmektedir, ancak ÖSYM kaydınızda SÖZ puanı bulunmaktadır."                                  |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          |     3.  The use case concludes (but the application might be blocked by UC-1.2 business rules).                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              |  EX.Global.2                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | None.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The retrieved score must be the "Placement Score" (Yerleştirme Puanı), not the raw score, as transfer rules are based on placement scores.                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The system must store the full precision of the score (e.g., 5 decimal places) for accurate ranking.                                                                                         |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | 1.  The student has a valid exam result in the ÖSYM database.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                          | 2.  The API provides the specific score type required by the target department.                                                                                                                        |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | If the API is down (EX.1), the system allows manual entry, but ÖİDB (UC-2.1) will have to verify the uploaded result document manually.                                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

[]

1.  User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Provide National Exam Score (YKS) (UC-8.3)

-   Placement Scores must be stored with full precision (e.g., 5 decimals) for correct ranking calculations (UC-4.3 / UC-4.4).

-   API requests must securely use the verified student's TCKN only; no cross-student queries allowed.

-   If no result exists for the chosen year, show the specific warning for missing ÖSYM data.

-   If the returned score type mismatches the department requirement, show a conflict warning (e.g., SAY vs SÖZ).

-   The integration must specifically fetch and map the Placement Score (Yerleştirme Puanı), not the raw exam score.

-   The system must support querying different exam years.

-   Only the necessary score type should be fetched/stored to comply with KVKK.

-   Retrieved scores become locked/read-only in the form unless the API fails.

-   Every query must be logged with masked TCKN, year, and result; repeated timeouts should alert the System Admin.

    1.  Use case 4 for user 8

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- -------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-8.4                                                
  Use Case Name:   Validate Document Authenticity                        
  Created By:      Group 1                          Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                       Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- -------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | External Verification System (e-Devlet / YÖK / University APIs)                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Enables the External Verification System to receive a document identifier (e.g., Barcode, QR Code, Verification Code) from our system and return the document's current validity status (Valid, Invalid, Expired). |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  The main system (UC-2.1: Verify Application Intake) is being executed by an ÖİDB Officer (or automatically by the system background worker).                                                                   |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The student has uploaded a document with a verifiable code (e.g., e-Devlet Transcript).                                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  The API connection for the relevant service (e.g., e-Devlet) is "Active" (Postcondition of UC-7.6)                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  A verification result ("Valid", "Invalid", or "Expired") is returned to the main system.                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  The main system updates the document's status icon (e.g., Green Checkmark) in the ÖİDB review screen (Taslak Postcondition).                                                                                   |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Essential for fraud prevention)                                                                                                                                                                              |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | High (Once for every verifiable document in every application).                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal Course of Events: | 1.  This use case is "included" (called) by UC-2.1 (Verify Application Intake).                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  Our system parses the uploaded document to extract the Verification Code (e.g., "YOK-12345-ABCDE") or QR Code data.                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 3.  Our system sends a secure API request to the relevant provider (e.g., e-Devlet API) containing the code (Taslak Step 1).                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 4.  The External API validates the request credentials.                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 5.  The External API checks the code against its central registry.                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 6.  The External API determines the document is authentic and currently valid.                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 7.  The External API returns a successful response (e.g., HTTP 200) with a body indicating "Status: Valid" and optionally returns the document metadata (Owner Name, Date) for cross-check (Taslak Step 2 & 3).    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 8.  Our system marks the document as "Verified (Authentic)" on the ÖİDB screen (Taslak Step 4).                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 9.  The use case concludes. (Control is returned to UC-2.1).                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Alternative Courses:     | -   UC-8.4.AC.1.STEP.5 (Document is Invalid/Fake):                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the External API cannot find the code in its registry.                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The External API returns a response indicating "Status: Invalid" (Taslak Step 3).                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  Our system marks the document as "Rejected (Fake/Invalid)" and flags the application for immediate rejection (triggering UC-2.1.AC.2).                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     4.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | -   UC-8.4.AC.2.STEP.5 (Document is Expired):                                                                                                                                                                      |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 5, the External API finds the code but determines the generated document has expired (e.g., old student certificate).                                                                              |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The External API returns a response indicating "Status: Expired".                                                                                                                                          |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  Our system marks the document as "Expired" and flags it for correction (triggering UC-2.2).                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     4.  The use case concludes.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exceptions:              | -   UC-8.4.EX.1 (Barcode Not Readable):                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     1.  At step 2, our system tries to read the barcode/QR from the PDF but fails (e.g., low quality scan).                                                                                                        |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     2.  The system cannot send a request to the API.                                                                                                                                                               |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     3.  The system marks the document as "Manual Check Required" (Manuel Kontrol Gerekli).                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |     4.  The use case terminates (ÖİDB Officer must verify manually in UC-2.1).                                                                                                                                     |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          |  EX.Global.2                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Includes:                | UC-8.6: Provide Status Codes for Error Handling (Conditionally included in errors).                                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Special Requirements:    | 1.  SR-1: The system must be able to recognize verification codes from major Turkish providers (e-Devlet, YÖKSİS, ÖSYM).                                                                                           |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                          | 2.  SR-2: The verification result must be cached to prevent redundant API calls for the same document.                                                                                                             |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Assumptions:             | The document uploaded by the student is a digital-born PDF (not a photo of a printout), allowing for easier barcode extraction.                                                                                    |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Notes and Issues:        | This automated step saves significant time for ÖİDB but does not replace manual visual inspection (e.g., ensuring the uploaded transcript belongs to the correct student if the name metadata isn't returned).     |
+--------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.  []User interface

2.  Performance/software quality requirements

Use Case: Validate Document Authenticity (UC-8.4)

-   If the barcode/QR code cannot be extracted from the PDF, the system must mark the document as Manual Check Required instead of rejecting it.

-   If the external verification API is unavailable or returns an error, the system must fall back to manual review rather than blocking UC-2.1.

-   A returned status of Invalid must be treated as a high-risk authenticity failure and flagged for rejection in UC-2.1.

-   Verification requests must be sent over secure channels, and the returned “Owner Name” must match the student’s identity to prevent misuse.

-   The verification outcome must be clearly shown to the officer (Valid / Invalid / Manual Check).

-   Successful authenticity checks should be cached to avoid repeated external API calls for the same document.

-   Document authenticity verification must not replace academic validation—the officer must still check GPA, credits, etc.

-   Each verification attempt must be logged with masked code, timestamp, document type, and result; invalid results should trigger an administrative alert.

    1.  Use case 5 for user 8

        1.  Use case template (use-case-template.docx file)

  ---------------- ------------------------------------- -------------------- --
  Use Case ID:     UC-8.5                                                     
  Use Case Name:   Respond to Live Validation Requests                        
  Created By:      Group 1                               Last Updated By:     
  Date Created:    18.11.2025                            Date Last Updated:   
  ---------------- ------------------------------------- -------------------- --

+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Actor:                   | API System (Generic - covers YÖKSİS, ÖSYM, NVI, e-Devlet)                                                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Description:             | Defines the standardized interaction capability of the External API Systems to receive synchronous, real-time (live) validation queries from our system and provide immediate structured responses to enable automated decision-making. |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Preconditions:           | 1.  Our system has an active internet connection and valid API credentials configured (UC-7.6).                                                                                                                                         |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  A specific validation use case (e.g., UC-8.1, UC-8.2, UC-8.3, UC-8.4) has initiated a request.                                                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Postconditions:          | 1.  The requested data (or verification result) is delivered to our system in real-time.                                                                                                                                                |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 2.  The transaction is logged by both systems for audit purposes.                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                          | 3.  Our system can proceed with its workflow (e.g., filling the form, verifying a document) without manual intervention.                                                                                                                |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Priority:                | High (Infrastructure requirement)                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+--------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Frequency of Use:        | Very High (Every time any external verification is needed).                                                                                                                                                                             |
